announcements.detail: Acme Solar Holdings Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "ACME Solar commissions additional 155 MW / 470 MWh Battery Energy Storage System projects in Rajasthan".
announcements.ai_summary: Acme Solar Holdings Limited has announced the commissioning of additional Battery Energy Storage System projects. These projects in Rajasthan have a capacity of 155 MW and 470 MWh. This expansion highlights the company's ongoing development in the renewable energy sector.

announcements.subject: Conversion
announcements.detail: Five-Star Business Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about allotment of 3,10,000 equity shares pursuant to conversion of share warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Five-Star Business Finance Limited has completed the conversion of 3,10,000 share warrants into equity shares. The conversion price for these warrants was INR 770.00 per share. This action increases the company's issued equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Capri Global Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 as amended ( SEBI Listing Regulations ) in relation to the public issue of non-convertible debentures. (Draft Shelf Prospectus)'.
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Limited is proceeding with a public issue of non-convertible debentures. The company's Board of Directors approved this issuance, and the Management Committee has now adopted the draft shelf prospectus. The total amount for this issuance is up to ₹20,000 million, with debentures having a face value of ₹1,000 each.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: IRIS RegTech Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts.
announcements.ai_summary: IRIS RegTech Solutions Limited's strategic partner in Brazil, MZ Consult, has been awarded a mandate by a leading Oil and Gas Company in Brazil. The contract is for Disclosure Management and ESG Reporting solutions, with IRIS Carbon being the selected platform. This award follows a competitive RFP process.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Veedol Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Extension of Time for Repayment of Unsecured Loan granted to Andrew Yule & Company Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Veedol Corporation Limited has extended the repayment deadline for an unsecured loan granted to Andrew Yule & Company Limited. The repayment date has been moved from March 31, 2026, to September 30, 2026. All other terms and conditions of the loan remain unchanged. Andrew Yule & Company Limited is a Government of India Enterprise and a co-promoter of Veedol Corporation.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Physicswallah Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Press Release on Physicswallah''s Vishwas Diwas Event.
announcements.ai_summary: Physicswallah Limited has issued a press release titled "PhysicsWallah’s Vishwas Diwas demonstrates deep online penetration in Bharat and strong student response to ‘Ask AI’ Sees record growth in new and underpenetrated pin codes". This announcement highlights the company's online reach in India and the positive student reception to its 'Ask AI' feature. The press release details significant growth in new and underpenetrated areas.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: KPIT Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on N Dream AG ( N-Dream ) Subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: KPIT Technologies Limited has transferred its 26% stake in N Dream AG to its wholly owned subsidiary, KPIT Technologies (UK) Limited. Following this, KPIT UK now holds a 90% stake in N Dream, making it a step-down subsidiary of KPIT India. This restructuring aims to achieve parity and reorganize within the KPIT group's organizational structure, with the overall group holding in N Dream remaining at 90%.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "IRFC delivers Rs 12,842 crore strategic refinancing for HURL, advancing whole-of-government financing vision".
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited (IRFC) has announced a strategic refinancing of Rs 12,842 crore for HURL. This transaction advances IRFC's vision for whole-of-government financing. The press release was dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.ai_summary: Suzlon Energy Limited noted a Material Price Movement in its scrip on March 23, 2026. The company has stated that it could not ascertain any specific event or information in the mainstream media that would have triggered this price movement. This information is provided for the members and the public.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Suzlon Energy Limited has been levied a penalty of Rs. 25 Lacs by the Office of the Deputy Director, Enforcement Directorate, Mumbai Zonal Office- II. This penalty relates to a contravention of Section 7 of FEMA, 1999, read with regulation 15 of Foreign Exchange Management (Current Account Transaction) Rules, 2000. The company states this is for a procedural matter concerning a bonafide transaction already reported to the RBI.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Welspun Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Grant of Stock Options under Welspun Enterprises Employee Benefit Scheme -2022.
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Enterprises Limited announced the grant of 6,00,000 stock options to eligible employees under its Welspun Enterprises Employee Benefit Scheme - 2022. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors on March 23, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee meeting held on March 21, 2026. Further details of the grant are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Other Restructuring
announcements.detail: Reduction of equity share capital of Senseforth AI Research Private Limited, a subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Fractal Analytics Limited has completed the reduction of equity share capital for its subsidiary, Senseforth AI Research Private Limited. The equity share capital was reduced from Rs. 26,27,88,470 to Rs. 2,62,88,270, following an order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai. This restructuring involved the extinguishment of equity share capital as per the NCLT's rectified order dated September 23, 2025.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has acquired equity shares in its wholly owned subsidiary, H.G. Banaskantha Bess Private Limited. The investment amounts to Rs. 48,52,00,000/- through a subscription of a Rights issue. This acquisition is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Persistent Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Persistent Systems Limited has appointed Ms. Ruchi Kulhari as Executive Vice President (EVP) and Chief of Staff. This appointment is effective from Monday, March 23, 2026 (EST). The company has provided the requisite disclosure as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: JK Tyre & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Report from the Audit Committee of Directors and Independent Directors of the Company certifying distribution of proceeds to eligible shareholders of fractional entitlements pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cavendish Industries Ltd. with JK Tyre & Industries Ltd. and their respective shareholders.'
announcements.ai_summary: JK Tyre & Industries Limited has reported that the Audit Committee and Independent Directors have certified the distribution of proceeds from fractional entitlements. This distribution is pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cavendish Industries Ltd. with JK Tyre & Industries Ltd. Proceeds from the sale of shares allotted upon consolidation of fractional entitlements have been distributed to eligible shareholders of erstwhile Cavendish Industries Ltd.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Electronics Mart India Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.ai_summary: Electronics Mart India Limited has commenced commercial operations for a new Multi-Brand Store under the brand name ‘ELECTRONICS MART’. The store is located at Shop No. 1 & 2, S-2, S-2/4, Ground Floor, Commercial Shopping Centre-1, Avantika, Sector-1, Rohini, Delhi-110085, spanning 3,200 square feet. Commercial operations began on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has submitted a disclosure to the Exchange under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: PC Jeweller Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Limited's Board of Directors has allotted 35,18,36,870 equity shares on the conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants. This allotment follows the earlier issuance of 48,08,02,500 warrants by way of preferential allotment. The resolution for the allotment was passed by circulation on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Birla Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding copy of press release issued by the Company w.r.t. the commencement of third line of production at Kundanganj unit in Uttar Pradesh of RCCPL Private Limited, a wholly owned material subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Corporation Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, RCCPL Private Limited, has commissioned a third production line at its Kundanganj grinding unit in Uttar Pradesh. This expansion increases the unit's production capacity by 1.4 million tons. A press release detailing this development has been issued.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: GB Global Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: GB Global Limited has lent Rs. 13,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirteen Crore) to Tangent Profin Private Limited. The company has confirmed that the promoter/promoter group has no interest in this investment. The transaction was conducted on an arm's length basis.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Orient Green Power Company Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Orient Green Power Company Limited has been allotted 61,44,490 equity shares at a face value of Rs. 10 each by its subsidiary, Delta Renewable Energy Private Limited (DELTA). This allotment represents a portion of DELTA's third tranche of a preferential issue. Orient Green Power Company Limited's equity holding in DELTA remains unchanged at 70% subsequent to this allotment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Capri Global Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Capri Global secures Moody s  Ba3  Ratings and Fitch  BB- ; Signals Strong Credit Strength and Growth Momentum".
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Limited announced on March 23, 2026, that it has secured a 'Ba3' Corporate Family Rating from Moody's and a 'BB-' Long-Term Issuer Default Rating from Fitch Ratings. These ratings signal strong credit strength and growth momentum for the NBFC.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: In compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR ESG score of 60 has been assigned by M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited is submitted. The other details given in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Limited has received an ESG score of "60" from M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited. This score is now available on the websites of BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The company has complied with Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR for this disclosure.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities by approving JSW Dulux Limited - Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026, subject to shareholder approval
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) has approved the Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026. This approval is subject to shareholder consent. The company also appointed two new directors to its Board.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AWL Agri Business Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: AWL Agri Business Limited (formerly Adani Wilmar Limited) announced that the Ministry of Corporate Affairs approved the strike-off of its subsidiary, AWL Edible Oils and Foods Private Limited. This approval was granted on March 23, 2026, following an application filed by the subsidiary on January 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the Stock Exchange an update on acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited (SAMIL) provided an update on its proposed acquisition of a 28.15% stake in HR Dhauliganga Private Limited (HRDPL). HRDPL is a special purpose vehicle established by Hinduja Renewables Energy Private Limited. This acquisition is related to captive power generation and consumption under Electricity Laws.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: We herewith enclosed the Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e March 23, 2026, approving the Proposed acquistion of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. Detailed letter is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: SEPC Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. This decision was made during a board meeting held on March 23, 2026. The acquisition is subject to approvals from the company's lenders and shareholders.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) announced board meeting outcomes on March 23, 2026. The board appointed Mr. Kaustubh Sudhakar Kulkarni as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) and Ms. Sutapa Banerjee as an Additional Director (Independent Woman Director). Both appointments are effective March 23, 2026, and are subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Indo-National Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the Quarter and HalfYear Ended September 30, 2025'.
announcements.ai_summary: Indo-National Limited has submitted revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2025. An omission occurred during the preparation of the previous statements, specifically the failure to eliminate investments in M/s. Helios Strategic Systems Limited amounting to ₹64.50 Crores. This has been rectified, resulting in a reduction in Non-Current Financial Assets and Total Assets.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has informed the Exchange about Redemption of Commercial Papers issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has successfully redeemed its Commercial Papers amounting to ₹50 Crore on the due date, March 23, 2026. The redemption payment, including interest, has been made in full. This disclosure is in accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Astral Limited has informed the Exchange about Grant of patent  MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET  to Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited a wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Astral Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited, has been granted a patent by the Government of India for its "MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET" invention. This patent, valid for 20 years from November 01, 2021, relates to a solution for multiple household connections from a single tapping with flexible outlet configurations. The invention aims for cost-efficiency, reduced disruption, and longer main-pipe life.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Solar Industries India Limited has informed the Exchange about Certificate confirming fulfilment of payment obligation with respect to Commercial Paper issued dated December 23, 2025 by Solar Industries India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Solar Industries India Limited has confirmed the full payment of Rs. 100 Crores for its Commercial Paper issued on December 23, 2025. The payment was made on the due date, March 23, 2026, to Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited. This fulfills the company's payment obligation related to this issuance.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Updates on the Scheme of Amalgamation of Godawari Energy Limited with Godawari Power And Ispat Limited and their eespective Shareholders.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power And Ispat Limited has received a certified copy of the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated March 12, 2026, sanctioning the amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Godawari Energy Limited, with itself. The order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, making the scheme effective as of March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Nestle India Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on a one-on-one meet (virtual) with an institutional investor held on 23rd March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Nestle India Limited held a one-on-one virtual meeting with an institutional investor on March 23, 2026. The company has confirmed that no unpublished price sensitive information was shared during this meeting. This update is in reference to their previous letter dated March 9, 2026, and is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: GNG Electronics Limited has informed the Exchange about Execution of Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited
announcements.ai_summary: GNG Electronics Limited has entered into a Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited on March 10, 2026, to an existing Facility Agreement. The company received this agreement on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has been awarded a Letter of Award (LOA) dated March 23, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India for the "Construction of 4 lane Greenfield Section of NH-33 from Mokama to Munger in the State of Bihar." The contract price for this project is INR 2440.87 Crores, and it is to be completed within 910 days on a Hybrid Annuity Mode.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: NBCC (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Work Orders received by NBCC (India) Limited in the ordinary course of business amounting to Rs 58.61 Cr. approx.'.
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has secured a new work order from Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University in Mayurbhanj, Odisha. The approximate value of this order is Rs 58.61 crore, excluding GST. This award falls within the ordinary course of the company's business operations.

announcements.subject: Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Bajaj Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about issue of Securities
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Finance Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 23, 2026, approved the issue of 3,472,439 equity shares. These shares will be issued at their respective grant prices to the Trustees of BFL Employee Welfare Trust under the BFL Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2009. The Board meeting commenced at 2:15 p.m. and concluded at 4:10 p.m.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: DMCC SPECIALITY CHEMICALS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: DMCC Speciality Chemicals Limited has been served with a commercial suit filed by Shipping Corporation of India Limited (SCI) in the Hon’ble City Civil Court. The company has provided details as required by SEBI Listing Regulations, stating that these litigations are not expected to materially impact its financial position.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: TREJHARA SOLUTIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update on Acquisitions '.
announcements.ai_summary: Trejhara Solutions Limited has completed the acquisition of 100% equity stake in LP Logistics, a Dubai-based entity. LP Logistics will now become a wholly owned subsidiary of Trejhara Solutions Limited. Additionally, the company has set up a joint venture with G S Marketing Associates and concluded the acquisition of its business undertaking.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: PVR INOX Limited has informed the Exchange about opening of 3-screen Multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza, Moti Nagar, New Delhi.
announcements.ai_summary: PVR INOX Limited has opened a new 3-screen multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza in Moti Nagar, New Delhi. This expansion brings PVR INOX's total screen count to 1,802 across 360 properties in 114 cities in India and Sri Lanka. The new cinema features advanced projection and sound systems.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of receipt of ISO 9001:2015 Certification for the Secretarial Function'.
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited's Secretarial Function has received ISO 9001:2015 certification from Bureau Veritas. This certification recognizes the company's robust quality management systems, standardized processes, and commitment to corporate governance and operational excellence.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Wipro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Wipro Expands Strategic Presence in South Korea, Launches Innovation Lab in Seoul".
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited announced the expansion of its business operations in South Korea, including an enlarged office footprint in Seoul and the launch of a new Innovation Lab. This move reinforces South Korea's role as a strategic growth market for Wipro and enhances its ability to serve local clients.

announcements.company: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has executed the acquisition of Parekhs Hospital Private Limited as its wholly-owned subsidiary on March 22, 2026. Further details as required by SEBI regulations have been provided in an annexure.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Foods Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HFL announces acquisition of Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business .
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Foods Limited (HFL) has announced the acquisition of a Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business through a Business Transfer Agreement. This acquisition is being made by HFL, which is a Vanity Case Group Company. Further details of the acquisition are provided in a press release dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Fineotex Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates on the Plant Visit scheduled to be held on Tuesday, March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Fineotex Chemical Limited will host an investor and analyst plant visit on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at its Ambernath plant in Maharashtra. The visit will include representatives from various firms such as Mili Capital, Prad Capital, and Fort Capital. No price-sensitive information will be discussed during the visit.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Puravankara Limited has informed the Exchange about Corporate Guarantee given on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Limited has provided a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 50,00,00,000 (Fifty Crores Rupees) on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited shareholders have approved the transfer of a business undertaking to its subsidiary, Mahindra Blossom Developers Limited, on a slump sale basis. The resolutions were passed by the requisite majority via postal ballot, with the voting results declared on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hind Rectifiers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HIRECT Announces Availability of Advanced Copper Conductors forHigh-Power Transformers from Expanded India Facility".
announcements.ai_summary: Hind Rectifiers Limited (HIRECT) has announced the commercial availability of advanced copper products, including Continuously Transposed Conductors (CTC), Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (PICC), and Enameled Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (EPICC). These products are manufactured at their newly inaugurated state-of-the-art copper processing plant in Nashik, India, and will be exported globally for high-power transformers and wound components.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: LTM Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "LTM Expands BlueVerseTM Tech with AppIQ, AgentIQ and FusionIQ to Accelerate AI-Led Engineering".
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Limited announced the expansion of its AI-led engineering platform, BlueVerseTM Tech. This expansion includes the launch of three new purpose-built platforms: AppIQ, AgentIQ, and FusionIQ. These platforms are designed to help enterprises modernize applications, manage AI-first software delivery, and engineer quality at scale. The announcement was made on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Press Release in connection with Joint venture project ".
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have announced a joint venture to accelerate future growth in e-mobility. This announcement follows their earlier joint venture agreement dated March 18, 2026. The press release regarding this joint venture was issued on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has completed the acquisition of an additional 30.58% equity stake in its subsidiary, Apollo Health and Lifestyle Limited (AHLL). The transaction involved acquiring 41,650,638 equity shares from International Finance Corporation and IFC EAF Apollo Investment Company for Rs. 12,540.68 million. Following this acquisition, Apollo Hospitals' effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharti Airtel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Airtel brings faster speeds and wider 5G coverage to millions in Gujarat with 2,750+ new sites".
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has issued a press release announcing the deployment of over 2,750 new 5G sites across Gujarat in the last 12 months. This expansion aims to provide faster speeds, wider coverage, and an improved network experience for millions of customers in 36 districts.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update regarding Investment in the share capital of Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Transrail Lighting Limited has recalled share application money remitted for its wholly-owned subsidiary, Transrail Trading LLC in the UAE. This decision was made due to the current war-like situation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - FUNDING OF  06TH SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES VII E (INE153A08147)
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited has funded the 6th semi-annual interest payment for its MTNL Bond Series VII E (INE153A08147) into an escrow account maintained with Bank of India. The funding was completed on March 21, 2026, for the interest payment due on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 3,000 Non Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has approved the allotment of 3,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of INR 1,00,000 and was issued at INR 98,000.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Hari Shanker Khemka For and on behalf of Hari Khemka Business Family Trust has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Hari Shanker Khemka, on behalf of the Hari Khemka Business Family Trust, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Akshay Dhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Akshay Dhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "ICONiQ White Whisky Makes History: World s Fastest Growing MillionaireSpirits Brand Crosses 10 Million Cases Milestone.".
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has issued a press release announcing that its ICONiQ White Whisky has crossed the 10 million cases milestone. The brand is described as the world's fastest-growing millionaire spirits brand. The press release is dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gudhi Padwa sales update for the Financial Year 2025-2026.
announcements.ai_summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited reported a significant increase in Gudhi Padwa sales for FY 2025-2026, reaching Rs. 73.004 million. This represents a 2.51 times year-on-year growth compared to Rs. 20.818 million in the previous year's Gudhi Padwa sales.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Operationalization of Projects'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has operationalized an aggregate of 510.1 MW power projects at Khavda, Gujarat, through its stepdown subsidiaries. This commissioning has increased AGEL’s total operational renewable generation capacity to 17,982.3 MW. The decision to operationalize these plants and commence power generation was made on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the exchange about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL, a listed entity, has filed an intimation with the stock exchanges where its shares are listed. A copy of KFIL's intimation is enclosed for reference.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: RITES Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: RITES Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from Research Designs and Standards Organisation (RDSO), Lucknow. The contract is for the comprehensive maintenance of a dedicated test track between Gudha and Thathana Mithri stations in the Jodhpur division of NWR.

announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) regulation, 2015 regarding receiving the Master Letter of Acceptance from Dakshin Gujarat Vij Company Limited.

announcements.detail: Kindly note that the solar power capacity addtion of the company will be increased from the existing 55.40 Mwp to 57.90 MWp.

announcements.detail: Outcome of separate Independent Director meeting

announcements.subject: Jigar Cables Ltd - 540651 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - Update On Commencement Of Commercial Prodution.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith intimation regarding update on commencement of commercial production.
announcements.ai_summary: Jigar Cables Ltd has provided an update on the commencement of commercial production at its new manufacturing facility. Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and in reference to their earlier intimation dated December 31, 2025, the company has commenced commercial production of conductors (semi-finished products), which are key components of MVCC, at the new unit. This commencement is effective from March 30, 2026. Full-scale commercial production of MVCC and HT cables is anticipated within the next two to three months, pending operational stabilization and completion of remaining production processes.

announcements.subject: Seamec Ltd - 526807 - Intimation On Deployment Status Of Vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK"
announcements.detail: The status of on hire of Vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK"
announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Ltd has provided an update on the deployment status of its vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK". Further to their previous intimation dated March 13, 2026, the company wishes to inform that the vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK" has been on-hired. The information regarding the vessel being on-hired was received by the company on March 29, 2026, at 02:21 hours. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd
announcements.subject: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd - 543367 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: We wish to inform that PARAS has divested its entire 58.02% equity stake held in its subidiary, Ayatti Innovative Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Limited (PARAS) has divested its entire 58.02% equity stake in its subsidiary, Ayatti Innovative Private Limited (Ayatti). This divestment comprises 15,20,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each, and consequently, Ayatti is no longer a subsidiary of PARAS. The Agreement for Sale was executed on March 30, 2026, with the sale completion also on the same date. PARAS received a total consideration of Rs. 6,99,20,000/- for this transaction. The buyer is Unifab Ultra Technologies LLP, and they do not belong to the promoter/promoter group/group companies. Ayatti contributed 0.32% to PARAS's consolidated turnover and had a negative net worth of Rs. 3,37,45,744.64 during the financial year 2024-25.

announcements.subject: IIRM Holdings India Ltd - 526530 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 30, 2026 for Vurakaranam Rama krishna
announcements.ai_summary: Vurakaranam Ramakrishna, a promoter of IIRM Holdings India Limited, has executed a Non-Disposal Undertaking on March 28, 2026, for 2,00,00,000 equity shares. This encumbrance, representing 29.35% of the total share capital, is in favor of Axis Trustee Services Limited. The reason for this undertaking is in connection with Non-Convertible Debentures issued by India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited, a material wholly-owned subsidiary. The disclosure of this encumbrance was made to the stock exchanges and the company on March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd - 512455 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation of Completion of accquisition of the CHEMAF Group of Companies by Virtus Lloyds Minerals Holding, a step down subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Lloyds Metals and Energy Limited (LMEL) has announced the completion of the acquisition of the CHEMAF Group of Companies by Virtus Lloyds Minerals Holding (VLMH). VLMH is a step-down subsidiary of LMEL, with VLMH holding a 100% equity stake in CHEMAF Group Limited, which includes Chemaf Resources Limited and Chemaf SA. These entities are involved in copper and cobalt mining and processing in the Democratic Republic of Congo. VLMH is a joint venture where LMEL's wholly-owned subsidiary, Lloyds Global Resources FZCO, holds a 49% equity stake, and Virtus Minerals Group, USA, holds the remaining 51%. This acquisition was disclosed on March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Exxaro Tiles Ltd - 543327 - Announcement Under The Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Reg 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of the incorporation of the Wholly owned Subsidiary Company named " ARESTA GENERAL TRADING FZE"  in Dubai
announcements.ai_summary: Exxaro Tiles Limited has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary in Dubai named "ARESTA GENERAL TRADING FZE". The incorporation was completed on March 23, 2026, with the license issued on March 30, 2026. The subsidiary has a share capital of AED 1,00,000, consisting of 1000 shares of AED 100 each. Its primary business will be the trading of all types of tiles. As it is a wholly-owned subsidiary, it is considered a related party, and the consideration is cash.

announcements.subject: Bharat Electronics Ltd - 500049 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: BEL receives orders worth Rs.1660 Crore.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has secured new orders totaling Rs. 1660 Crore. These orders were received after the company's last disclosure on March 17, 2026. The significant orders include those for satellite communication networks, electronic warfare systems, communication equipment, avionics, software solutions, munitions, EVMs, strategic components, upgrades, spares, and services. This announcement was made on March 30, 2026, and is considered a press release.

announcements.subject: PTC Industries Ltd - 539006 - Grant Of 13,827 Options Under PTC Employees Stock Option Scheme 2019 ('Scheme')
announcements.detail: As enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: PTC Industries Ltd, through its Compensation Committee meeting held on March 30, 2026, has approved the grant of 13,827 Stock Options under the PTC Employees Stock Option Scheme 2019. These options are convertible into 13,827 equity shares of the Company, each with a face value of Re. 10/-, upon exercise by the eligible employees of the Company and its subsidiary companies. The scheme is in compliance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021. This grant is in line with SEBI's master circulars regarding employee stock options.

announcements.subject: Star Cement Ltd - 540575 - Intimation Pursuant To Disclosure Requirement Under Regulation 31A(8)(C) Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('LODR Regulations')
announcements.detail: Attached herein the Intimation pursuant to disclosure requirement under Regulation 31A(8)(c) of LODR, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Star Cement Ltd has submitted an application to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited on February 10, 2026, seeking no-objection for the reclassification of the Chamaria Group. This reclassification is from the 'Promoter/Promoter Group' category to the 'Public Category' in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This action follows a Board Meeting held on February 06, 2026, where the outcome of this proposed reclassification was discussed. The Chamaria Group, comprising 28 individuals and entities, collectively held a significant number of shares as of December 31, 2025, and their reclassification is subject to regulatory approval.

announcements.subject: Dixon Technologies (India) Ltd - 540699 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR- Approval Received Under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS)
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR- Approval received under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS)
announcements.ai_summary: Dixon Technologies (India) Limited announced on March 30, 2026, that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Dixon Display Technologies Private Limited, has received approval under the Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS). This approval, granted on March 30, 2026, is for undertaking Display module sub-assembly. The subsidiary plans to scale up capabilities in liquid crystal modules and TFT-LCD modules. This initiative aims to strengthen India's electronics manufacturing ecosystem and advance self-reliance in critical components.

announcements.subject: CRISIL Ltd - 500092 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: CRISIL Ltd has received a TDS proceedings assessment order under sections 201(1) and 201(1A) read with section 195 on March 29, 2026, for the Financial Year 2019-20 (AY 2020-21). The order determines a demand of INR 27.24 Crores for TDS on foreign payments, including interest. This demand is based on previous years' orders on the same issue, against which the company has filed an appeal. CRISIL Ltd intends to file an appeal against this order, and there is no immediate impact on the company's financial, operational, or other activities.

announcements.subject: Tata Chemicals Ltd - 500770 - Press Release - Tata Chemicals' Mithapur Facility Achieves 1 Million Tonnes Soda Ash Production Milestone In FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a copy of the Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Chemicals Limited announced that its Mithapur facility in Gujarat has achieved a significant milestone by producing 1 million tonnes of soda ash in the Financial Year 2025-26. This achievement is attributed to the consistent efforts and strong collaboration across various teams, including operations, maintenance, utilities, logistics, procurement, quality, safety, and support functions, as well as the Marketing & Sales teams. The company's Chief Financial Officer highlighted that this milestone reflects disciplined execution, cost optimization, and asset productivity, leading to enhanced margins and long-term value creation. This accomplishment reinforces Tata Chemicals' strong position in the global soda ash industry, emphasizing its focus on efficiency, reliability, and sustainable operations.

announcements.subject: NBCC (India) Ltd - 534309 - Intimation Of Engagement Of NBCC (India) Limited As Project Management Consultant In Republic Of Seychelles For Execution Of Housing And Associated Infrastructure Works
announcements.detail: As per the attached notification
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has been engaged as a Project Management Consultant by the Government of the Republic of Seychelles for the execution of housing and associated infrastructure works. The company has received a Letter of Intent and in-principle agreement for this project, which involves the planning, design, and procurement of 1008 affordable housing units and associated infrastructure, including a sewage treatment plant (STP). The project, valued at USD 75 million, will be funded by EXIM Bank under a Line of Credit (LoC) scheme. This engagement represents a significant international project for NBCC (India) Limited.

announcements.subject: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd - 544080 - Prior Intimation For Sale Of Equity Shares By The Promoter Under Sr. No. 7 (Ii) Of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/Pod2/P/CIR/2023/18 Dated February 03, 2023 On The Manner Of Achieving Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS)
announcements.detail: Intimation for sale of shares by Promoter, pursuant to the Compliance of MPS Requirements
announcements.ai_summary: Mrs. Anisha Raoof Dhanani, a Promoter of Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd, intends to sell 5,000 equity shares, representing 0.16% of the company's total paid-up share capital. This sale is planned to be completed by March 30, 2026, and is being undertaken to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements. The need to divest shares arises from an increase in the Promoter/Promoter Group's shareholding beyond permissible limits, following an Open Offer initiated by Century 21 Officespace Private Limited and its Persons Acting in Concert (PACs). This action is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/P/CIR/2023/18 dated February 03, 2023, concerning the manner of achieving MPS.

announcements.subject: Aqylon Nexus Ltd - 530943 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Intimation About Execution Of Memorandum Of Understanding (Mou) With AITMC Ventures Private Limited
announcements.detail: Disclosure related to execution of MOU with AITMC Ventures Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Aqylon Nexus Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with AITMC Ventures Private Limited to collaborate on a joint AI skilling program across India, with a focus on non-metropolitan areas. The program aims to train youth in AI skills, leveraging Aqylon's AI Code Platform and trained faculty to deliver a structured 3-month course. The objective is to achieve a minimum of 30,000 trained and certified AI professionals annually, with a total capacity of approximately 33,600 candidates. This initiative aligns with national government programs like Digital India and Skill India, enabling trained candidates to pursue roles such as AI Web Designers and AI Content Creators. This MoU outlines a framework for cooperation and does not constitute a legally binding agreement; any definitive agreements will be subject to mutual consent, due diligence, and regulatory compliance.

announcements.subject: Biocon Ltd - 532523 - Intimation Of Change In Name Of Step-Down Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation of change in name of step-down subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Biocon Ltd has announced a change in the name of its step-down subsidiary, Biosimilar Collaborations Ireland Limited. Effective March 27, 2026, the subsidiary's name has been changed to Biocon Biologics Ireland Limited. This information was received from Biocon Biologics Limited, a material subsidiary of Biocon Ltd, on March 29, 2026. The company will make this information available on its website, www.biocon.com, for public record.

announcements.subject: PNB Housing Finance Ltd - 540173 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Management Committee of the Company as authorized by the Board of Directors, has approved allotment of 30000 NCDs today i.e. March 30,2026. Details are provided in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 30, 2026, the Management Committee of PNB Housing Finance Ltd, authorized by the Board of Directors, approved the allotment of 30,000 Listed, Secured, Rated, Taxable, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000, aggregating to a total of Rs. 300 Crore. These NCDs have a tenure of 3 years, maturing on March 30, 2029. The initial coupon rate is 7.10%, with subsequent rates being a floating rate linked to the 3-Month T-Bill plus a spread of 187 bps. The allotment was made through private placement via the Electronic Book Provider (EBP) platform of NSE and will be listed on the Wholesale Debt Market (WDM) Segment of the NSE.

announcements.subject: Nexxus Petro Industries Ltd - 544265 - Board Meeting Outcome for Nexxus Petro Industries Limited Has Submitted Outcome Of Board Meeting For Sale Of Undertaking Of The Company
announcements.detail:
Nexxus Petro Industries Limited has submitted Outcome of Board Meeting for Sale of Undertaking of the Company.Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of Nexxus Petro
Industries Limited ('the Company') at its meeting held on 30th March, 2026 has approved the sale of
land parcel admeasuring 3.99 acres owned ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Nexxus Petro Industries Limited, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the sale of a land parcel measuring 3.99 acres located in Pali, Rajasthan, for a total consideration of Rs. 17,171,000. This sale is not expected to impact the company's operations and does not constitute the sale of substantially the whole undertaking. The land contributed Rs. 51.75 Crore to the company's total turnover of Rs. 305.04 Crore in the last financial year, representing approximately 16.97% of the turnover. The value of this undertaking is less than 20% of the company's net worth of Rs. 32.26 Crore. The purchaser is not a related party, and none of the company's promoters, directors, or their relatives have any interest in this transaction. The company will make this information available on its website, www.nexxusgroup.co.in.

announcements.subject: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd - 500103 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Notification of Award (NOA) from NTPC Ltd.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) has received a Notification of Award (NOA) from NTPC Limited for the Main Plant Package of the 3x800 MW Telangana Stage-II supercritical thermal power project. BHEL emerged as the successful bidder for this project in October 2024, and had previously received a Limited Notice to Proceed (LNTP) in November 2024 for basic engineering work. The scope of the contract includes the design, engineering, manufacturing, supply, erection, commissioning, and testing of the main plant package (Boiler, Turbine & Generator), along with civil and structural works. The execution of the Main Plant Package works is to be completed within 62 months from the date of the NOA. The consideration for this order is over Rs. 13,500 Crore, excluding GST. Both BHEL and NTPC are Central Public Sector Enterprises (CPSEs).

announcements.subject: Maha Rashtra Apex Corporation Ltd - 523384 - Corporate Action-Intimation of Right issue
announcements.detail: Attached herewith Letter of Offer dated 11th March, 2026 for the Right issue of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Maha Rashtra Apex Corporation Limited has filed its Final Letter of Offer dated March 11, 2026, with the stock exchanges (BSE & NSE) for its Rights Issue. This filing is in compliance with SEBI ICDR Regulations and a SEBI Circular dated March 11, 2025. The company is issuing up to 1,40,91,896 equity shares of face value ₹ 10 each at a price of ₹ 10 per equity share, aggregating up to a certain amount not fully specified in the provided text. The Letter of Offer is for eligible shareholders only and confirms that none of the promoters or directors are wilful defaulters. The company was originally incorporated as "Maharashtra Apex Bank Limited" on April 26, 1943, and has undergone name changes since then. The details of the Rights Issue are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Lodha Developers Ltd - 543287 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of NCDs
announcements.ai_summary: Lodha Developers Limited has approved the allotment of 50,000 rated, listed, senior, secured, redeemable, taxable, transferable, non-convertible debentures (NCDs) with a face value of ₹ 1,00,000 each, aggregating to ₹ 500 Crore. These NCDs were allotted on a private placement basis on March 30, 2026. The NCDs carry an interest rate of 8.52% per annum, payable half-yearly, with the first interest payment due on September 30, 2026. The maturity date for these debentures is March 31, 2036, providing a tenure of 10 years. A first-ranking charge will be created over certain specified assets as security for these NCDs. In case of default in payment of interest or principal for more than 3 months, a default interest of 2% per annum over the applicable rate will accrue. These NCDs are proposed to be listed on the Wholesale Debt Market segment of the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ltd - 532741 - Disclosure Of  Payment Made To Kamdhenu Ventures Limited For Conversion Of 1,46,45,000 Warrants Into Equity Shares.
announcements.detail: Disclosure of Payment made to kamdhenu Ventures Limited for Conversion of 1,46,45,000 warrants into Equity Shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Limited has disclosed a payment of Rs. 7,46,89,500/- (Rupees Seven Crore Forty-Six Lakh Eighty-Nine Thousand Five Hundred only) to Kamdhenu Ventures Limited (KVL). This payment represents 75% of the total amount due for the conversion of 1,46,45,000 warrants into equity shares of KVL. This transaction is in accordance with the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. KVL is expected to allot 1,46,45,000 equity shares to Kamdhenu Limited upon the conversion of these warrants. Kamdhenu Ventures Limited operates in the Paint Industry and had a consolidated turnover of Rs. 26,610.48 Lakhs and EBIDTA of Rs. 1,682.16 Lakhs for FY 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Kaveri Seed Company Ltd - 532899 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of Nomination And Remuneration Committee Of The Company Granting Options Under The Kaveri Employee Stock Option Plan - 2024.
announcements.detail: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee at its meeting held on March 30, 2026 approved the grant of 1,42,352 (One Lakh Fourth Two Thousand Three Hundred and Fifty Two) options to eligible employees of the Company exercisable into equivalent number of fully paid-up equity shares of Rs.2/- each acquired by the Kaveri Employees trust through the secondary market route.
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of Kaveri Seed Company Ltd, in its meeting on March 30, 2026, approved the grant of 1,42,352 stock options to eligible employees under the Kaveri Employee Stock Option Plan - 2024. These options are exercisable into an equivalent number of fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 2/- each. The Kaveri Employees Trust acquired these shares through the secondary market route. The exercise price for each option is Rs. 790/-, with a vesting schedule starting after one year and vesting over the next four years in ratios of 20%, 20%, 25%, and 35%. The options can be exercised within a maximum period of four years from the vesting date, up to March 30, 2030.

announcements.subject: Standard Capital Markets Ltd - 511700 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: The Board of Directors of the company has approved the circular resolution for partial redemption.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Standard Capital Markets Ltd, through a circular resolution passed on March 30, 2026, has approved the partial redemption of 123 Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 10,00,000/-, totaling an aggregate redemption amount of ₹12,30,00,000. These debentures were originally allotted on July 30, 2024, following a request from the debenture holder on July 18, 2024. The redemption is in accordance with the terms and conditions set at the time of issuance. Following this partial redemption, the company will have 881 Secured Non-Convertible Debentures remaining.

announcements.subject: Indusind Bank Ltd - 532187 - Intimation Under Regulations 29(3) Of The SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulation, 2011
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the intimation on the captioned subject.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IndusInd Bank Ltd has received disclosures from its promoters, IndusInd International Holdings Limited and IndusInd Limited, regarding the encumbrance and release of shares. These disclosures, made on March 28, 2026, are in accordance with Regulations 29(3) and 31 of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The bank is submitting these intimations to the stock exchanges and the target company. The disclosures detail the creation, invocation, or release of encumbrances on shares held by the promoters. The bank has also uploaded this information on its website.

announcements.subject: Sterlite Technologies Ltd - 532374 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of warrants to promoter of the Company on preferential basis
announcements.ai_summary: Sterlite Technologies Limited's Authorization and Allotment Committee, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the allotment of 4,53,00,000 (Four Crores Fifty Three Lakhs) warrants to its promoter, Twin Star Overseas Limited, on a preferential basis. Each warrant is priced at Rs. 110 and is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share of face value Rs. 2, at a premium of Rs. 108 per share. The company has received Rs. 1,24,57,50,000 as the initial payment (25% of the warrant price) for these warrants. Upon full conversion and exercise, Twin Star Overseas Limited will hold 47.75% of the company's equity on a fully diluted basis. The warrants can be exercised within 18 months from the allotment date.

announcements.subject: Super Sales India Ltd-$ - 512527 - Intimation Of Change In Schedule Of Operations Of Engineering Division
announcements.detail: Intimation of Change in schedule of operations of Engineering Division
announcements.ai_summary: Super Sales India Limited has announced a change in the schedule of operations for its Engineering Division - Gears unit. Effective March 31, 2026, the company will revert to a six-working-day week for this division. This decision follows an earlier disclosure made on September 25, 2024. The company has informed the stock exchange as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Simran Farms Ltd - 519566 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Held On 30.03.2026
announcements.detail: The Company hereby submits Outcome of Board Meeting held on Monday, 30th March, 2026 pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Simran Farms Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the allotment of 10,18,300 equity shares upon the conversion of warrants. These warrants were converted at an issue price of Rs. 155 per share, which includes a premium of Rs. 145 per share. The allotment is to members of the promoter group and other persons, following the receipt of the remaining 75% subscription amount of Rs. 116.25 per warrant. The board also approved the notice of a postal ballot for a proposed resolution, authorizing the Company Secretary to conduct the e-voting process. The meeting commenced at 10:45 AM and concluded at 11:45 AM.

announcements.subject: Premier Energies Ltd - 544238 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release attached
announcements.ai_summary: Premier Energies Limited has commissioned a new 5.6 GW solar module manufacturing facility in Seetharampur, Telangana, with trial production commencing on March 30, 2026. This expansion, spread across 75 acres, is expected to create approximately 2,000 jobs and significantly boost India's clean energy manufacturing ecosystem. With this addition, Premier Energies' total solar module capacity has reached 11.1 GW, positioning it as one of India's largest solar manufacturers. The facility features advanced automation and AI-powered fault detection for producing high-efficiency G12R TOPCon 0BB panels, capable of manufacturing four modules every 16 seconds. This strategic move aims to deliver reliable, high-efficiency solutions at scale and support India's clean energy transition.

announcements.subject: One Mobikwik Systems Ltd - 544305 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release title "MobiKwik becomes Official Payments Partner of Rajasthan Royals for IPL 2026"
announcements.ai_summary: The Fintech platform MobiKwik has announced a significant partnership, becoming the Official Payments Partner for the Rajasthan Royals IPL team for the 2026 season. This marks MobiKwik's first-ever sports sponsorship, aiming to connect with India's next 100 million digital payment users. The collaboration will involve co-branded marketing campaigns, on-ground activations, and digital integrations, offering fans seamless UPI payments and access to personal loans. This partnership is strategically aligned with MobiKwik's brand purpose of serving aspirational young India, a demographic that resonates with the dynamic and digitally engaged fanbase of the Rajasthan Royals. The agreement is effective for the IPL 2026 season.

announcements.subject: Tube Investments of India Ltd - 540762 - Incremental Investment In TI Clean Mobility Private Limited
announcements.detail: Incremental Investment in TI Clean Mobility Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Tube Investments of India Limited (TII) has entered into a Subscription Agreement for an incremental investment of approximately Rs. 250 Crore in its subsidiary, TI Clean Mobility Private Limited (TICMPL). This investment will be made towards Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) in TICMPL. The agreement was executed on March 30, 2026. Following this, TII and TICMPL have also entered into an Amended and Restated Shareholders' Agreement with the existing investors of TICMPL. TICMPL is involved in the electric mobility business, and this fundraising is intended to help scale up its operations and those of its subsidiaries. TII currently holds 25 Crore equity shares and 5 Crore Series B CCPS in TICMPL.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to applicable provisions of the SEBI LODR, we wish to inform that in terms of the Board authorization dated September 3, 2025, read with resolution passed by the SIIC committee of the Company on March 24, 2026, the Company has allotted 75,000 Secured Redeemable NCDs of face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- each aggregating to Rs. 750 Cr. on a private placement basis. 

Refer attached PDF for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has successfully raised Rs. 750 Crore through the private placement of 75,000 Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000. The allotment of these NCDs, which carry a coupon rate of 9.75% per annum, was approved by the Securities Issuance and Investment Committee on March 24, 2026, and took place on March 30, 2026. The NCDs have a tenor of approximately 1.01 years (369 days) and are set to mature on April 03, 2027. These NCDs are secured, rated, listed, taxable, and redeemable, and will be listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and the BSE Limited. This issuance was authorized by the Board on September 3, 2025.

announcements.subject: Prime Fresh Ltd - 540404 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Meeting Updates
announcements.detail: Outcome of Finance Committee Meeting for conversion of 118849 warrants into equal no of equity shares
announcements.ai_summary: The Finance Committee of Prime Fresh Limited, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the allotment of 1,18,849 equity shares to Mr. Hiren Chandrakant, a promoter. These shares were allotted pursuant to the conversion of 1,18,849 convertible warrants. The allotment was made at a price of Rs. 164 per equity share, including a share premium of Rs. 154 per share, aggregating to a total of Rs. 1,94,91,236. The face value of each equity share is Rs. 10. Following this allotment, the issued share capital of the company will be Rs. 14,10,62,040, comprising 1,41,06,204 equity shares. The subscribed and paid-up share capital will stand at Rs. 13,87,98,610, consisting of 1,38,79,861 equity shares of Rs. 10 each.

announcements.subject: Intellect Design Arena Ltd - 538835 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intellect Design Arena Ltd. has informed the Exchange regarding the press release titled "India''s Leading E-Commerce Giant Selects Purple Fabric Accounts Payable to Revolutionise Financial Operations at Scale"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Intellect Design Arena Ltd. has announced that one of India's leading E-commerce Giants, serving over 500 million registered users, has selected its Purple Fabric Accounts Payable solution. This solution aims to revolutionize financial operations and streamline workflows across the e-commerce giant's extensive network of sellers and partners. The e-commerce entity operates with a marketplace offering over 150 million products across 75+ categories, supporting a seller ecosystem of nearly 1.5 million merchants and partners, with an estimated GMV exceeding Rs. 1.5 lakh crore. Purple Fabric Accounts Payable, powered by Open Business Impact AI, enables a shift from task-based automation to autonomous, decision-led financial operations, addressing challenges like complex vendor reconciliations and payments in a high-volume environment.

announcements.subject: Prime Focus Ltd - 532748 - Issuance Of Corporate Guarantee On Behalf Of Unlisted Material Subsidiary Of Company
announcements.detail: The Board of Directors at their meeting held today has approved issuance of Corporate Guarantee in favor of ICICI Bank for an amount upto Rs. 1000 million plus interest and any other associated cost in relation to the loan.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Prime Focus Ltd, at their meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the issuance of a Corporate Guarantee in favor of ICICI Bank Limited. This guarantee is for an amount up to Rs. 1,000 million (Rupees One Thousand Million Only), plus interest and associated costs, to secure a term loan facility to be availed by DNEG India Media Services Limited, an unlisted material subsidiary of the company. The promoter/promoter group/group companies have no interest in this transaction, and it is conducted at an arm's length. The Corporate Guarantee will represent a contingent liability for Prime Focus Ltd.

announcements.subject: LG Electronics India Ltd - 544576 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release -"LG Electronics India Deploys Advanced HVAC Solutions at ''Seva Teerth'', the Prime Minister''s Office Building"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: LG Electronics India (LGE India) has announced the successful deployment of its advanced HVAC (Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning) solutions at the Prime Minister’s Office building, Seva Teerth. The company installed a Variable Refrigerant Flow (VRF) air-conditioning system with a total capacity of 1,590 horsepower, comprising 113 outdoor units. These VRF systems were supplied from LGE India’s Pune manufacturing facility, supporting the 'Make in India' initiative. The systems are designed to operate efficiently even at temperatures up to 39°C. Mr. Hong Ju Jeon, Managing Director and Chief Sales and Marketing Officer, expressed honor in contributing to the building and highlighted the importance of energy-efficient climate control systems for operational efficiency in commercial and institutional spaces.

announcements.subject: Cineline India Ltd - 532807 - Opening Of 2 - Screen Multiplex In Chennai, Tamil Nadu
announcements.detail: Opening of 2 - Screen Multiplex in Chennai, Tamil Nadu
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cineline India Ltd has opened a new 2-screen multiplex under the brand name "MovieMax" in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. This is the company's first cinema in the state and expands its portfolio to 85 operational screens across 22 properties and 16 cities. The multiplex is located in Prince Ratnapuri Garden Residency, Walltax Road, Kondithope, Chennai, and features 452 seats, 4K laser projection systems, next-generation 3D capabilities, and Dolby sound systems. It also offers an enhanced F&B experience with a pure vegetarian menu and a live kitchen concept. The CEO, Ashish Kanakia, stated that this launch strengthens their pan-India presence and caters to evolving cinema audience preferences.

announcements.subject: Black Box Ltd - 500463 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Press Release on completion of Preferential Issue.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Black Box Limited has successfully completed a preferential issue, receiving ₹386.36 crore through the conversion of warrants. These 92,65,215 warrants were converted into equity shares at a price of ₹417 per share. All warrant holders fully exercised their rights, indicating strong investor confidence. The promoters contributed ₹200 crore, representing 51.76% of the total funds raised, and their shareholding now stands at 69.99%. This infusion of capital will strengthen the company's balance sheet and support its growth strategy.

announcements.subject: Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd - 500620 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that the Company has delivered its 2002 built Very Large Gas Carrier "Jag Vishnu" to the buyers.
announcements.ai_summary: The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited has announced the delivery of its 2002 built Very Large Gas Carrier, "Jag Vishnu," to the buyers. The sale of this vessel was contracted in the third quarter of FY26. Following this transaction, the company's owned fleet now comprises 40 vessels, including 26 Tankers and 14 Dry Bulk Carriers, with an aggregate deadweight tonnage of 3.20 million dwt. The company also has a contract to purchase one secondhand Kamsarmax Dry Bulk Carrier, with this acquisition expected to be completed by the first quarter of FY27. A press release detailing this delivery has been issued.

announcements.subject: Tejas Networks Ltd - 540595 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Tejas Networks Ltd has announced the completion of a significant milestone for the BharatNet Phase III project, having cumulatively shipped over 17,000 IP/MPLS routers. These TJ1400 routers are being deployed by Project Implementation Agency (PIA) partners across 9 states and 5 union territories, carrying live traffic. The company is contracted to supply nearly 60,000 TJ1400 routers for BharatNet Phase III, which aims to provide broadband connectivity to over 55,000 Gram Panchayats and 2,000 Blocks.
