announcements.subject: Shine Fashions (India) Ltd - 543244 - Clarification Regarding Disclosure Of Share Transaction Of Mr. Anish Anil Mehta
announcements.detail:
We wish to clarify that the disclosure appearing under the BSE Listing Centre reflecting a transaction of disposal of shares by Mr. Anish Anil Mehta was inadvertently made while carrying out rectification as per BSE mail.

Kindly note that no Transaction involving disposal of shares has taken place on March 26th, 2026. The disclosure pertains only to the revision of the earlier filing dated 03.01.2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shine Fashions (India) Ltd has clarified that a disclosure filed on March 26, 2026, reflecting a share disposal by Promoter and Director Mr. Anish Anil Mehta, was an inadvertent error. The disclosure was made while rectifying an earlier filing from January 3, 2026, and the "revised" option was not selected. No transaction involving share disposal actually occurred on March 26, 2026; the filing was solely a revision of the January 3, 2026 disclosure related to a transaction on January 2, 2026. The company requests shareholders and stakeholders not to be misled by the initial filing, which has since been rectified.

announcements.subject: Reliance Industries Ltd - 500325 - Statement
announcements.detail: Statement
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Reliance Industries Ltd has categorically rejected recent media reports alleging the purchase of crude oil of Iranian origin, stating these claims are entirely baseless, factually incorrect, and misleading. The company urges media outlets to verify facts thoroughly before publication and to refrain from disseminating unsubstantiated reports that could misinform stakeholders and the public. This statement was issued on March 26, 2026, and copies were sent to the Luxembourg Stock Exchange and Singapore Exchange Limited.

announcements.subject: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd - 543942 - Sale Of Unsecured Stressed MFI Loan Portfolio To ARC
announcements.detail: As per intimation appended herewith
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, the authorized Management Committee of Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd approved a proposal for the sale of NPA and written-off loans to an Asset Reconstruction Company (ARC). This sale includes two portfolios of Unsecured Stressed MFI Loans. Pool 1 has an Aggregate Principal Outstanding as of December 31, 2025, of approximately ₹1,016.24 crore, with a Reserve Price/Binding Offer of ₹133.10 crore, to be settled in Cash + Security Receipts. Pool 2 has an Aggregate Principal Outstanding of approximately ₹474.75 crore, with a Reserve Price/Binding Offer of ₹62.19 crore, also to be settled in Cash + Security Receipts. The bank will separately intimate upon completion of the deal.

announcements.subject: 3i Infotech Ltd - 532628 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation letter that Company has received work order on March 25, 2026 from International Company.
announcements.ai_summary: 3i Infotech Inc., USA, a wholly-owned step-down subsidiary of 3i Infotech Ltd, has received a work order on March 25, 2026, from a leading US credit union. The order is for the design and implementation of Zero Trust - Identity and Access Governance (IAG) within the Cybersecurity domain. The engagement involves end-to-end implementation of the Saviynt IAM platform, design and architecting of IAM solutions, reviewing and optimizing existing environments, configuring and deploying Saviynt connectors, and identifying and reporting access security risks. The total value of the work order is approximately ₹1.26 Crores, exclusive of applicable taxes, and is to be executed within 10 months. This disclosure is made on a voluntary basis as the amount is below the materiality threshold.

announcements.subject: Sadbhav Engineering Ltd - 532710 - Please Find Enclosed Announcement For Signing Of Master Restructuring Agreement By Sadbhav Engineering Limited With Majority Consortium Lenders.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed announcement for signing of Master Restructuring Agreement by Sadbhav Engineering Limited with majority consortium lenders.
announcements.ai_summary: Sadbhav Engineering Limited announced on March 26, 2026, that it has signed a Master Restructuring Agreement (MRA) with a majority of its consortium lenders. This agreement, executed on March 25, 2026, involves IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited as the security trustee and debenture trustee, along with lenders including Punjab National Bank, Union Bank of India, Axis Bank Limited, Assets Enterprise Limited, Bank of India, and Yes Bank Limited. The MRA formally records the terms of the debt restructuring plan, prepared in accordance with the Reserve Bank of India's stressed assets restructuring framework. The debt being restructured aggregates to ₹1,516.71 Crores, comprising ₹906.35 Crore in fund-based exposure and ₹610.36 Crore in non-fund based limits, with the fund-based exposure to be restructured as convertible debentures. A significant term of the MRA is that the lenders have the right to appoint nominee directors.

announcements.subject: Cipla Ltd - 500087 - General Updates
announcements.detail: Mr Pradeep Bhadauria, Global Chief Scientific Officer has resigned to pursue interests outside Cipla and his last working day will be 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Cipla Ltd has announced that Mr. Pradeep Bhadauria, Global Chief Scientific Officer and a member of the Management Council, has resigned from his position. Mr. Bhadauria, who is also an employee of Cipla USA Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary, is leaving to pursue interests outside of Cipla. His last working day will be March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE and NSE of this development.

announcements.subject: DCX Systems Ltd - 543650 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Purchase Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Purchase Order
announcements.ai_summary: DCX Systems Limited has announced the receipt of purchase orders totaling approximately INR 8.92 Crores in the normal course of business. These orders are for the manufacture and supply of Cable and Wire Harness Assemblies from both domestic and international customers. Additionally, its wholly-owned subsidiary, Raneal Advanced Systems Pvt. Ltd., has secured purchase orders amounting to approximately INR 9.95 Crores for the manufacture and supply of Printed Circuit Board Assemblies from its customers.

announcements.subject: Bondada Engineering Ltd - 543971 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation of incorporation of subsidiary-Bondada Dinesh SPV Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Bondada Engineering Limited has incorporated a new subsidiary named BONDADA DINESH SPV PRIVATE LIMITED on March 26, 2026. This subsidiary has been established as a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) to execute and implement a project awarded by Maharashtra State Power Generation Company Limited (MAHAGENCO) to a consortium including Bondada Engineering Limited and Dinesh Engineers Limited. The formation of this project-specific entity is mandated by the Letter of Award (LOA) and Request for Proposal (RFP) to fulfill contractual obligations, including execution, financing, and operation of the project. This incorporation aligns with the company's strategic vision to strengthen its presence in the Power & Energy sector.

announcements.subject: Laxmi Dental Ltd - 544339 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Board of Directors at its meeting held today i.e Thursday, March 26, 2026 has approved Scheme of Amalgamation between Bizdent Devices Private Limited, Wholly owned subsidiary company (Transferor Company) and Laxmi Dental Limited (Transferee Company).
announcements.ai_summary: Laxmi Dental Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved a Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of Bizdent Devices Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Laxmi Dental Limited, with Laxmi Dental Limited itself. The amalgamation is being undertaken under Sections 230 and 233 of the Companies Act, 2013, and is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, including those from the Regional Director and stock exchanges. Bizdent Devices Private Limited, incorporated in 2021, is the Transferor Company, and Laxmi Dental Limited is the Transferee Company.

announcements.subject: Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd-$ - 531381 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Prestige Group and Arihant Group jointly acquire prime land parcel in Padi, Chennai, adding GDV of INR 5,000 crores".
announcements.ai_summary: Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd, as part of a joint venture with Prestige Group, has acquired a prime 16.331-acre land parcel in Padi, Chennai, on March 26, 2026. The acquisition, undertaken through Canopy Living LLP, a joint venture between Prestige Estates Projects Limited and Arihant Foundations and Housing Ltd, is projected to have a Gross Development Value (GDV) of ₹5,000 crore. The land will be developed into a premium residential project with an estimated saleable area of 3.6 million square feet. The project's strategic location near Anna Nagar is expected to capitalize on the consistent growth in Chennai's residential market.

announcements.subject: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd - 533274 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Prestige Group and Arihant Group jointly acquire prime land parcel in Padi, Chennai, adding GDV of INR 5,000 crores."
announcements.ai_summary: Prestige Group and Arihant Group, through their joint venture Canopy Living LLP, have jointly acquired a prime 16.331-acre land parcel in Padi, Chennai, on March 26, 2026. This acquisition is expected to have a Gross Development Value (GDV) of approximately ₹5,000 crore. The land parcel will be developed into a premium residential project with a total saleable area of about 3.6 million square feet. The strategically located site is in close proximity to Anna Nagar and boasts strong social infrastructure and connectivity. This transaction is considered one of the largest land deals in Chennai in the past decade and is anticipated to significantly impact the local residential market.

announcements.subject: B-Right Realestate Ltd - 543543 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: BRRL surpasses Rs. 1,000 Crore Market Capitalisation Milestone.
announcements.ai_summary: B-Right Realestate Ltd has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing ₹1,000 crore in market capitalization as of March 26, 2026. This achievement reflects strong investor confidence and the company's consistent business performance. The company has a pipeline of over 30 lakh sq. ft. in prime Mumbai locations and reported a 153% revenue growth for FY25, reaching ₹103.43 crore. In the first nine months of FY26, B-Right Realestate Ltd achieved pre-sales of ₹208.42 crore, with Q3 FY26 alone contributing ₹124.03 crore. The company remains committed to delivering high-quality residential and mixed-use projects and enhancing shareholder value.

announcements.subject: Trent Ltd - 500251 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E. 26Th March 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today i.e. 26th March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Trent Ltd, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved the issuance of unsecured, redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The total amount for this issuance will not exceed ₹500 crore, falling within the company's permissible borrowing limits under Section 180 of the Companies Act, 2013. This move is subject to all applicable regulatory and statutory approvals. The Borrowing and Investment Committee has been authorized to finalize the terms of issuance and allotment of these NCDs. Further details regarding the issuance and allotment will be provided upon completion. The Board meeting commenced at 2:00 p.m. and concluded at 6:45 p.m.

announcements.subject: AIA Engineering Ltd - 532683 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Update (Clarification)
announcements.detail: Clarification under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: AIA Engineering Limited has issued a clarification under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, to address apprehensions regarding the shortage of commercial LPG impacting its production. The company uses PNG as its primary fuel source, with LPG used in a very limited capacity in its heat treatment processes. AIA Engineering Limited confirms that there is no disruption in the availability of either PNG or LPG at its facilities, and all plants are operating normally. Furthermore, the company is in the process of modifying its fuel system to also utilize Light Diesel Oil (LDO) in addition to PNG and LPG.

announcements.subject: Elecon Engineering Company Ltd - 505700 - Intimation For Incorporation Of Grupo Radicon SA De CV, Step-Down Subsidiary Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation for Incorporation of Step-down subsidiary is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Elecon Engineering Company Limited has informed the incorporation of its step-down subsidiary, "Grupo Radicon SA de CV," in Mexico. This subsidiary was incorporated by Elecon Singapore Pte. Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of Elecon Engineering Company Limited. The Government's Tax Agency of Mexico issued a Tax Identification Number on March 24, 2026, based on documents submitted on January 8, 2026, making January 8, 2026, the effective date of incorporation. A formal certificate of incorporation from the Public Registry of Commerce is still awaited. The newly incorporated entity is eligible to commence operations as per Mexican law after obtaining the tax identification number. Grupo Radicon SA de CV will be involved in the sales, marketing, and servicing of industrial engineering products in Mexico and Latin America.

announcements.subject: Landmark Cars Ltd - 543714 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Landmark Cars Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 26, 2026, titled "Landmark Cars exits Volkswagen operations in Delhi NCR."
announcements.ai_summary: Landmark Cars Limited has issued a press release dated March 26, 2026, announcing its exit from Volkswagen operations in Delhi NCR, effective March 31, 2026. This dealership comprised one showroom and one workshop. The company has taken this decision to reduce losses from non-performing operations and align with its strategy to rationalize costs and improve operational efficiency. Landmark Cars will continue to operate its Volkswagen dealerships in Gujarat, which are profitable. Due to the assets in Delhi NCR being depreciated over multiple years, minimal financial impact is expected on the company's books. Landmark Cars is a premium automotive retail network with dealerships for various brands.

announcements.subject: Aegis Logistics Ltd - 500003 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Aegis Logistics Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026. The Board approved the issuance of consent for assignment to Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL). This relates to a previously disclosed Framework Agreement dated June 19, 2025, with Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited (AVTL) for the transfer of a specialized storage terminal for Ammonia at Pipavav Port. The Board's approval allows AVTL to assign its rights to transfer the terminal to ATPL, a subsidiary of AVTL. The Company will execute a separate Business Transfer Agreement with ATPL upon project completion. Further details will be provided upon the execution of this agreement.

announcements.subject: Capital Infra Trus - 544338 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Capital Infra Trus has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Capital Infra Trust, through its Investment Manager Gawar Investment Manager Private Limited, has disclosed material issues arising from a Board Meeting held on March 26, 2026. The Board approved raising an indemnity claim of INR 45,47,61,610/- from Gawar Construction Limited (GCL), the Sponsor, for a shortfall in GST claims related to change in law across four Project SPVs. This claim is due by March 27, 2026. Additionally, an indemnity claim of INR 24,23,98,314/- is expected from GCL by August 2027 for three other Project SPVs. The Board also approved raising claims from GCL for INR 13,84,56,118/- as compensation under a Project Management Agreement and INR 11,98,07,280/- as an indemnity claim under a Share Purchase Agreement for Gawar Nainital Highways Private Limited, both due by March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Precision Wires India Ltd - 523539 - Intimation For Start Of Commercial Production Of Copper Rod At Valvada
announcements.detail: Intimation for start of commercial production of Copper Roa at Valvada
announcements.ai_summary: Precision Wires India Ltd has announced the commencement of commercial production of Copper Rod at its Valvada plant. This follows the earlier intimation on March 18, 2026, regarding the receipt of BIS certification for the same plant. This marks a significant step in the company's operational expansion.

announcements.subject: Transpek Industry Ltd-$ - 506687 - Remarks Made By Board Of Directors On Fine Levied By BSE
announcements.detail: Remarks made by the Board of Directors on fine levied by BSE
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, the Board of Directors of Transpek Industry Limited reviewed the fine levied by BSE for delayed submission of a reclassification application from Promoter to Public Category. The Board opined that the fine was unjustified, considering the application was submitted in time but in a different category, deeming it a technical error rather than a violation. The company paid the fine under protest and has ensured adherence to BSE requirements, with the Board suggesting extra caution to prevent future occurrences.

announcements.subject: Archean Chemical Industries Ltd - 543657 - Intimation Of Agreement
announcements.detail: Intimation of  Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: Archean Chemical Industries Limited has entered into a loan agreement with its Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS), Neun Infra Private Limited, for Rs. 260 Crores. This loan is intended to fund the procurement of long-lead machinery and equipment for the compound semiconductor manufacturing facility of SiCSem Private Limited, which is part of the overall capital expenditure for the facility. Neun Infra Private Limited is the holding company for SiCSem Private Limited, which has received approval under the India Semiconductor Mission.

announcements.subject: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd - 539787 - Intimation Regarding Winding Up Of Healthcare Global (Tanzania) Private Limited, Wholly Owned Indirect Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: This is to inform that, the HealthCare Global (Tanzania) Private Limited, a non-operating wholly owned indirect subsidiary of the Company incorporated in Tanzania has been wound up with effect from March 02, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd has informed that its non-operating wholly owned indirect subsidiary, Healthcare Global (Tanzania) Private Limited, incorporated in Tanzania, has been wound up effective March 02, 2026. The company received the formal notification regarding the winding up on March 26, 2026. This subsidiary was not involved in any operational activities.

announcements.subject: Privi Speciality Chemicals Ltd - 530117 - Subscription Towards Equity Share Capital In Joint Venture Company, Prigiv Specialties Private Limited
announcements.detail: Subscription towards equity share capital in joint venture company, Prigiv Specialties Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, both joint venture parties, Privi Speciality Chemicals Limited and Givaudan SA, Switzerland, subscribed to the equity share capital of Prigiv Specialties Private Limited as per their Joint Venture Agreement dated July 29, 2021, and subsequent amendment agreements. The Board of Directors of Prigiv Specialties Private Limited approved a circular resolution for this allotment of equity share capital. Post-allotment, the paid-up capital of the joint venture company is INR 85,00,00,000, with Privi Speciality Chemicals Limited holding 51% (INR 4,33,50,000) and Givaudan SA holding 49% (INR 4,16,50,000).

announcements.subject: Gamco Ltd - 540097 - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 ("SEBI SAST Regulations'''''''').
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that our company has received disclosure from Rashi Goenka belonging to promoter group  of our company, regarding purchase of share of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Rashi Goenka, belonging to the promoter group of GAMCO LIMITED, has acquired 6,206 Equity Shares of face value Rs. 2 each through an open market transaction on March 25, 2026. This acquisition increases her total holding to 1,411,933 Equity Shares, representing 2.61% of the issued and paid-up equity share capital of the company. Before this transaction, her holding was 1,405,727 shares, representing 2.60% of the total voting capital. This disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd - 544407 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 26, 2026, the Board of Directors of Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd approved the sale of 10% of the equity stake, representing 5,000 Equity Shares of INR 10 each, in its subsidiary Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL) to Itochu Corporation for an aggregate consideration of INR 80,32,00,000. Post-sale, Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd will retain an 86% equity stake in ATPL. The Board also approved the assignment of rights to acquire a specialized storage terminal for Ammonia at Pipavav Port to ATPL. This assignment relates to a Framework Agreement dated June 19, 2025, with promoter Aegis Logistics Limited. A Business Transfer Agreement will be executed between ATPL and Aegis Logistics Limited upon project completion.

announcements.subject: Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd - 503101 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: The Company is pleased to inform that it has received from BSE observation letter dated March 25, 2026 with no adverse objection for the Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement.
announcements.ai_summary: Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, that it has received an observation letter from BSE Limited dated March 25, 2026, with no adverse objection regarding its Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement. This scheme involves Matrix Water Management Private Limited, Sanvo Resorts Private Limited, Marathon Realty Private Limited, Matrix Enclaves Projects Developments Private Limited, Matrix Land Hub Private Limited, Marathon Nextgen Realty Limited, and Marathon Energy Private Limited. The scheme is still subject to the approval of shareholders/creditors of the involved companies and other necessary statutory and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: JSW Energy Ltd - 533148 - Material Litigation Under Regulation 30(4) Of The Securities Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')- Update
announcements.detail: Material litigation under Regulation 30(4) of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')- Update
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Energy Ltd provided an update on March 26, 2026, regarding a writ petition filed by the Indian Wind Power Association, in which its subsidiary, JSW Neo Energy Limited, is a member. The petition challenged an order from the Andhra Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission (APERC) that permitted deductions from energy payments for Generation Based Incentive (GBI). The Hon’ble Supreme Court, in a judgment dated March 25, 2026, dismissed the appeal filed by Andhra Pradesh DISCOMs against the Appellate Tribunal for Electricity's order, which had set aside the APERC order. The Supreme Court held that GBI is to be disbursed to generating companies over and above the tariff.

announcements.subject: MSTC Ltd - 542597 - Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release regarding exclusive partnership with EaseMyTrip
announcements.ai_summary: MSTC Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, an exclusive partnership with EaseMyTrip (Easy Trip Planners Ltd.) to provide travel services for the government sector. Under this agreement, EaseMyTrip will integrate its APIs with MSTC’s system, offering services like flights, hotels, and holiday packages. MSTC will facilitate corporate travel for government sector organizations, leveraging EaseMyTrip's inventory and technology. This collaboration aims to expand EaseMyTrip's presence in the institutional and government travel segment and streamline procurement processes for MSTC.

announcements.subject: Vivid Mercantile Ltd - 542046 - Corporate Action-Outcome of Right issue
announcements.detail: The Board of Director at its meeting held on Thursday, 26 March, 2026 to consider and approve the Draft letter of offer to be filed with BSE Limited for their prior Approval for issue of right Equity shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Vivid Mercantile Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on March 26, 2026, considered and approved a Draft Letter of Offer for a Rights Issue of equity shares. The company plans to issue up to 5,01,28,200 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹1 each at an issue price of ₹5 per share, aggregating up to ₹2506.41 Lakhs. Each share includes a premium of ₹4. The Draft Letter of Offer will be filed with BSE Limited for prior approval and submitted to SEBI. The payment terms require the full issue price of ₹5 per share (₹1 face value and ₹4 premium) to be paid on application.

announcements.subject: Sandhar Technologies Ltd - 541163 - Board Meeting Outcome
announcements.detail: Board Meeting Outcome
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Sandhar Technologies Ltd, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved a proposal to establish an assembling/manufacturing facility in Mexico. This expansion aims to strengthen the company's international presence, improve proximity to key customers and OEMs, and enhance operational and supply chain efficiencies. The facility will be set up through a branch office, a wholly-owned subsidiary, or another permissible entity under Mexican law. Further details will be disclosed upon finalization of the structure and receipt of all necessary regulatory and statutory approvals.

announcements.company: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd
announcements.subject: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd - 523874 - Receipt Of Letter Of Acceptance From Central PSU - Indian Oil Corporation Limited - Selvassa.
announcements.detail: Receipt of Letter of Acceptance from Central PSU - Indian Oil Corporation Limited - Selvassa.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from Indian Oil Corporation Limited for the procurement and supply of 1.0 mm MS Plain and Epoxy Coated Barrels. The contract, valued at ₹4,59,90,000 (Rupees Four Crore Fifty-Nine Lakh Ninety Thousand only), is for a period of 12 months and will supply barrels to various locations including Silvassa. This LOA, bearing reference number MnC/LUB-36/PT-115/25-26/371 dated March 25, 2026, signifies a strong relationship with Indian Oil Corporation Limited and is expected to positively impact the company's operational performance by strengthening its order book. The company is fulfilling this order from its Silvassa facility.

announcements.subject: Sundaram-Clayton Ltd - 544066 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sundaram-Clayton Limited has successfully completed the sale of its 16.33-acre land parcel located in Korattur Village, Ambattur Taluk, Chennai District, Tamil Nadu, to Canopy Living LLP. This transaction, which was initiated with an Agreement to Sell on January 8, 2026, was finalized on March 26, 2026, with the execution and registration of the sale deed. The company received the balance consideration of ₹533.62 crore, in addition to the ₹25 crore advance previously paid, bringing the total sale proceeds to ₹558.62 crore. This divestment is a material development for the company, and the transaction was completed at 3:50 p.m. IST on March 26, 2026.

announcements.subject: Genesis Ibrc India Ltd - 514336 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Intimation for allotment of equity shares which were issued on preferential basis.
announcements.ai_summary: The Preferential Issue Committee of CCME Global Limited (formerly Genesis IBRC India Limited) approved the allotment of 3,22,50,000 fully paid-up equity shares on March 26, 2026. These shares have a face value of INR 10 each and were issued at par, aggregating to INR 32,25,00,000. The allotment was made for cash consideration through a preferential issue on a private placement basis to various individuals and one body corporate, including promoters Mr. Padmanaban Krishnamoorthy and Ms. V. Varalakshmi.

announcements.subject: Azad Engineering Ltd - 544061 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Azad Engineering Limited has been chosen as a Single Source Supplier Partner and signed a Long term contract and price agreement for 8 years term with Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Limited , Japan (MHI) for supply of highly engineered and complex hot-section Nozzle Vanes Segments of gas turbine engines, marking a rare achievement for any Indian precision engineering manufacturing Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Azad Engineering Limited has been appointed as a Single Source Supplier Partner by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Limited, Japan (MHI). The company has signed a Long Term Contract & Price Agreement (LTCPA) for an 8-year term. This agreement is for the supply of highly engineered and complex hot-section Nozzle Vanes Segments of gas turbine engines. This marks a significant advancement for the company, moving from manufacturing compressor airfoils to producing critical combustion hot-section components.

announcements.subject: Paradeep Phosphates Ltd - 543530 - Intimation Regarding Change Of Corporate Identification Number (CIN) Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has officially changed its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) from "L24129OR1981PLC001020" to "L20122OR1981PLC001020". This change is a result of an amendment to the Memorandum of Association, approved by shareholders on February 02, 2026, and subsequent alignment with the current National Industrial Classification (NIC) Code 2008. The updated Master Data from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs reflecting the new CIN has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Raaj Medisafe India Ltd - 524502 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Relating To Allotment Of Equity Shares
announcements.detail: The Board of Directors of Raaj Medisafe India Limited ('the Company') at its meeting held today, i.e., 26th March, 2026, approved the allotment of 32,75,000 fully paid-up equity shares having face value of Rs.10/-(Rupees Ten Only) each at a price of Rs.55.00/- (including premium of Rs.45/-) per equity shares. The details attached herewith,
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Raaj Medisafe India Limited, in a meeting held on March 26, 2026, approved the allotment of 32,75,000 fully paid-up equity shares. These shares have a face value of Rs. 10/- each and were issued at a price of Rs. 55.00/- per share, including a premium of Rs. 45/-. This allotment is part of a preferential issue and was approved following in-principle approval from BSE Limited on March 12, 2026. The company will apply for listing approval for these shares in due course.

announcements.subject: Ester Industries Ltd - 500136 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(1) And 29(2) Of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 29(1) and 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Mr. Ayush Vardhan Singhania, part of the Promoter Group, has acquired 756,285 equity shares, representing 0.77% of the voting rights, from Mr. Arvind Singhania. This transaction, dated March 26, 2026, was conducted through an off-market inter-se transfer by way of a gift. Mr. Arvind Singhania sold the same number of shares, also representing 0.77% of the voting rights. This disclosure is made under Regulations 29(1) and 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: TVS Supply Chain Solutions Ltd - 543965 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: TVS Supply Chain Solutions Limited, in furtherance to the intimation dated 26th March 2025, has approved additional infusion of funds in its wholly owned subsidiary, TVS Logistics Investment Inc.USA
announcements.ai_summary: TVS Supply Chain Solutions Limited (TVS SCS) has approved an additional infusion of funds into its wholly owned subsidiary, TVS Logistics Investment Inc. USA. This follows a previous intimation on March 26, 2025. The subsidiary has allotted equity shares to TVS SCS for a cash consideration of INR 213.44 Mn, at a price of USD 165/- each. The acquisition is for working capital requirements and is expected to be completed by March 31, 2026. TVS Logistics Investments Inc. USA will continue to remain wholly owned.

announcements.subject: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd - 543709 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI(LODR), 2015- Intimation Of Store Opening
announcements.detail: This is to inform your that, the Company has opened its new exclusive brand store at Shop no. 38, on the Ground Floor of Building known as ''Yashada Windsons'', Survey No. 104/1, 105, 105/2, Ravet, Pune, Maharashtra- 412101, today i.e. on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The company has opened a new exclusive brand store at Shop No. 38, Yashada Windsons, Ravet, Pune, Maharashtra - 412101, on March 26, 2026. This expansion is part of the company's ongoing business development efforts. Investors should note this physical expansion as a step towards increasing market presence. Further details regarding the store's performance will be monitored in future announcements.

announcements.subject: ITC Ltd - 500875 - Dissolution Of Blazeclan Americas Inc., A Step-Down Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Dissolution of Blazeclan Americas Inc., a step-down subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: ITC Limited has announced the dissolution of Blazeclan Americas Inc., a step-down subsidiary based in the USA, with effect from March 24, 2026. The company received confirmation of this dissolution yesterday at 11:12 p.m. Consequently, Blazeclan Americas Inc. is no longer a step-down subsidiary of ITC Limited. For the financial year 2024-25, Blazeclan Americas Inc. had a Total Income of ₹4.38 crores, representing 0.006% of ITC Limited's Total Income, and its Networth as of March 31, 2025, was ₹0.63 crore, representing 0.001% of ITC Limited's Networth. Blazeclan Americas Inc. became a step-down subsidiary of ITC Limited on October 1, 2024.

announcements.subject: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd - 534623 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Request(S) For Reclassification From 'Promoter/Promoter Group Category' To 'Public Category' In Accordance With Regulation 31A(10) Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: As per attached annexure.
announcements.ai_summary: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd has received requests for reclassification from 'Promoter/Promoter Group Category' to 'Public Category' from Mr. Umesh Vasantlal Modi, Mrs. Manisha Umesh Modi, Mrs. Kusumben Vasantlal Modi, and Ms. Aishwarya Umesh Modi. These individuals are part of the Promoter and Promoter Group of the company. The requests, dated March 26, 2026, are in accordance with Regulation 31A(10) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This intention for reclassification was previously disclosed in the Letter of Offer, which followed a Share Purchase Agreement executed on April 9, 2025, and an Open Offer.

announcements.subject: Rain Industries Ltd - 500339 - Rain Industries Limited-Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 - Acquisition Of Shares
announcements.detail: Rain Industries Limited- Disclosure under Regulation 29 (2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 - Acquisition of shares
announcements.ai_summary: Sujala Investments Private Limited, a person belonging to the promoter group of Rain Industries Limited, has acquired 53,300 equity shares of the company on March 25, 2026, from the open market. This acquisition represents 0.0158% of the total voting capital. Following this acquisition, Sujala Investments Private Limited now holds an unspecified percentage of shares in Rain Industries Limited. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd - 543952 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release dated March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd has announced that NIIT MTS has been recognized as a Strategic Leader in the Fosway 9-Grid™ for Digital Learning for the fourth consecutive year. This recognition highlights NIIT MTS's strong market performance, customer advocacy, and comprehensive suite of AI-first managed learning services. The Fosway 9-Grid™ is a model used to assess digital learning solutions and providers based on performance, potential, market presence, total cost of ownership, and trajectories. The press release dated March 26, 2026, emphasizes NIIT MTS's focus on innovation and its AI-first approach to learning, which translates into improved business performance for its clients.

announcements.subject: ACS Technologies Ltd - 530745 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Work order  from Hindustan Aeronautics Limited
announcements.ai_summary: ACS Technologies Ltd has received a significant work order from Hindustan Aeronautics Limited. The order entails the delivery of 6 rack integrated data centres. This new engagement is expected to positively contribute to the company's revenue and strengthen its position in the data centre solutions market. The work order is valued at ₹15,576,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty-Five Lakhs Seventy-Six Thousand only) and is scheduled for completion by September 19, 2026. This is a domestic order, and neither the promoter nor promoter group companies have any interest in Hindustan Aeronautics Limited.

announcements.subject: Suraj Industries Ltd - 526211 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 26, 2026.
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting held on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Industries Ltd announced the outcome of its Board of Directors meeting held on March 26, 2026. The board approved the acquisition of 25,000 equity shares of M/s Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited from Mr. Vikas Gupta, a member of the Promoter Group. Additionally, the board approved the acquisition of 24,800 equity shares of M/s Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited from Mr. Ritesh Gupta, Joint Managing Director and a member of the Promoter Group. Shri Gang Industries operates a Bottling Plant for Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL) and Country Liquor and commissioned a grain-based distillery unit in September 2022. The meeting commenced at 01:30 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 02:15 P.M. (IST).

announcements.subject: UltraTech Cement Ltd - 532538 - Company Update: Settlement Proceedings
announcements.detail: Company Update: Settlement Proceedings
announcements.ai_summary: UltraTech Cement Limited has resolved settlement proceedings related to the acquisition of cement plants from Jaiprakash Associates Limited (JAL). The company had issued 1,00,000 Series A Redeemable Preference Shares of face value Rs. 1,00,000 each on 27th June, 2017, which were held in escrow pending the satisfaction of conditions related to the Dalla Super unit and mines. Following a settlement in arbitration and a final award passed by the Arbitral Tribunal on 26th March, 2026, all rights and interests in the Dalla Super unit and mines have vested in UltraTech Cement. Consequently, all claims and liabilities related to the Series A RPS have been fully discharged.

announcements.subject: LTIMindtree Ltd - 540005 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: LTM Limited has issued a press release titled “LTM Positioned as a Leader in ISG’s Provider LensTM Evaluation for Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem 2025”. The press release highlights LTM's leadership across key quadrants in both the United States and Europe for Oracle Cloud and Technology Ecosystem. This recognition underscores LTM's capabilities as a Business Creativity partner for large enterprises. The company has submitted this press release for public dissemination and record-keeping.

announcements.subject: Bikaji Foods International Ltd - 543653 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Additional Acquisition of Stake by Bikaji Foods Retail Limited (Wholly-Owned Subsidiary of the Company) in Hazelnut Factory Food Products Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Bikaji Foods Retail Limited (BFRL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Bikaji Foods International Limited, has completed the second tranche of its acquisition in Hazelnut Factory Food Products Private Limited (THF). BFRL has acquired an additional 8.59% stake in THF. This acquisition is a continuation of previous stake purchases, as detailed in earlier communications dated October 16, 2024, and October 26, 2024. The company is providing this update as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd - 544176 - Intimation About Payment Of Interest And Redemption Amount On Non-Convertible Debentures Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation about payment of interest and redemption amount on Non-Convertible Debentures of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Aadhar Housing Finance Limited has provided an update regarding the payment of yearly interest and redemption amount for its Non-Convertible Debentures (ISIN - INE538L07270). The due date for this payment was March 31, 2026. However, as March 31, 2026, is a bank holiday, the payment will be made on the preceding working day, March 30, 2026. This action is in accordance with the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: Bharat Dynamics Ltd - 541143 - General Updates On Advanced  Akash Weapon Systems
announcements.detail: General updates on Advanced Akash Weapon Systems
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) has successfully completed the First-off Production Model (FOPM) of the Advanced Akash Weapon System. This upgraded system incorporates enhanced sub-systems, which will improve performance and bolster the combat capabilities of the Indian Armed Forces. The system demonstrated high precision against various aerial threats, highlighting BDL's expertise in delivering complex defense systems. The completion of the FOPM is expected to pave the way for the commencement of deliveries of these Advanced Akash Weapon Systems to the Indian armed forces shortly.

announcements.subject: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd - 544027 - Intimation Of Conference Meeting Held On March 25, 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation of Conference Meeting held on March 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about its participation in a conference meeting held on March 25, 2026, in Mumbai. The meeting commenced at 04:15 PM and concluded at 05:50 PM. This disclosure is made pursuant to the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. A list of company officials who participated in the meeting is provided as an annexure, and the same has been uploaded to the company's website. Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has explicitly stated that no unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during this meeting.

announcements.subject: Le Travenues Technology Ltd - 544192 - Media Release - Abhibus And Fleetx Partner To Bring AI-Powered Safety & Fleet Intelligence To Buses
announcements.detail: AbhiBus and Fleetx Partner to Bring AI-Powered Safety & Fleet Intelligence to Buses
announcements.ai_summary: Le Travenues Technology Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, a partnership between its bus business, AbhiBus, and Fleetx. This collaboration aims to bring AI-powered safety and fleet intelligence solutions to buses. AbhiBus, a leading online bus ticketing platform, will integrate advanced video telematics and driver safety solutions from Fleetx, an AI-driven fleet intelligence platform, across its bus operator network. This initiative is intended to enhance passenger safety, improve operational visibility, and increase driver accountability. The media release is enclosed and filed in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd - 543417 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: As enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: RateGain Travel Technologies Limited announced on March 26, 2026, a partnership with Cashfree Payments. This collaboration positions Cashfree Payments as a Platinum Partner for RateGain's RG Pay product, enabling local payment acceptance for global travel brands. The partnership aims to enhance payment solutions for the travel industry. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release detailing this partnership has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Happiest Minds Technologies Ltd - 543227 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Happiest Minds and Unifyapps Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption
announcements.ai_summary: Happiest Minds Technologies Limited announced on March 26, 2026, a strategic partnership with UnifyApps. This collaboration aims to accelerate the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) within enterprises. The partnership will leverage the strengths of both companies to offer advanced AI solutions. Further details of this strategic alliance, including the specific technologies or services to be jointly offered and the scope of the collaboration, are provided in the press release. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release was issued from Bengaluru, Seattle, and London.

announcements.subject: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd - 500266 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of shares of Bajaj Finance Limited and Bajaj Auto Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd has disclosed details regarding the acquisition of shares in Bajaj Finance Limited and Bajaj Auto Limited. The announcement, made on March 26, 2026, refers to Annexure 1 & 2 for specific details as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Further information regarding the transaction, including the number of shares acquired, the price per share, and the total consideration, is expected to be detailed in these annexures. The company has submitted this disclosure to both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. Investors should refer to the attached annexures for precise figures and terms of the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Media Ventures Ltd - 533217 - Disclosure Regarding Ottplay Business Of The Company
announcements.detail: Disclosure regarding OTTplay business of the Company is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Media Ventures Ltd announced on March 26, 2026, that it will cease offering new OTTplay subscription packs from March 31, 2026. However, existing subscribers to the OTTplay platform will continue to receive support. This decision was made by the Board of Directors of the Company. The relevant details concerning this business decision are enclosed as Annexure I and have also been uploaded to the company's website, www.hmvl.in.

announcements.subject: Diamines & Chemicals Ltd-$ - 500120 - Disclosure  Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 Received
announcements.detail: We submit herewith Disclosure dated March 25, 2026 under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 received.
announcements.ai_summary: Diamines and Chemicals Limited has received a disclosure dated March 25, 2026, under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure is being submitted as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015. The company requests that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd - 544536 - Intimation Of Receipt Of SEBI Mutual Fund License In Subsidiary Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of SEBI Mutual Fund License in Subsidiary Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Wealth First Portfolio Managers Limited's subsidiary, Lakshya Asset Management Private Limited, has received the final license from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) to act as an Asset Management Company (AMC) for mutual funds. This approval, dated March 25, 2026, follows an earlier intimation on May 8, 2025. The company is requested to take this information on record and display it on the stock exchange notice board.

announcements.subject: Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd - 512267 - Intimation Of Order Of The Regional Director For Shifting Of Registered Office Of The Company
announcements.detail: In furtherance to our intimations dated August 13, 2025 and January 23, 2026, w.r.t. the shifting of the Registered Office of the Company from the 'A/308, Dynasty Business Park CHS LTD, A K Road, Opp. Sangam Cinema, Nr. Kohinoor Hotel, Andheri (East), Mumbai - 400059, Maharashtra' in the State of Maharashtra to 'Plot No. 38, 4th Floor, Institutional Area, Sector 32, Gurugram-122001, Haryana' in the State of Haryana, we wish to inform you that Hon'ble ....
announcements.ai_summary: Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd has received an order from the Regional Director, Western Region, Mumbai, approving the shifting of its registered office. The company had previously informed the exchange on August 13, 2025, and January 23, 2026, about this proposed relocation. The registered office will be moved from 'A/308, Dynasty Business Park CHS LTD, A K Road, Opp. Sangam Cinema, Nr. Kohinoor Hotel, Andheri (East), Mumbai - 400059, Maharashtra' to 'Plot No. 38, 4th Floor, Institutional Area, Sector 32, Gurugram-122001, Haryana'. This order signifies a key step in the process of officially changing the company's registered jurisdiction from Maharashtra to Haryana.

announcements.subject: L&T Technology Services Ltd - 540115 - Entering Into Business Transfer Agreement To Sell And Transfer The Smart World And Communication Business Unit Of The Company On A Slump Sale Basis To AMI Paradigm Solutions Private Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation for entering into Business Transfer Agreement to sell and transfer the Smart World and Communication Business Unit of the Company comprising of the safe and smart segment and communication segment, on slump sale basis to AMI Paradigm Solutions Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: L&T Technology Services Limited (LTTS) has entered into a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) on March 25, 2026, to sell its Smart World and Communication Business Unit (SWC Unit) to AMI Paradigm Solutions Private Limited. This transaction is structured as a slump sale, meaning the entire business unit is being transferred as a going concern. The SWC Unit comprises the safe and smart segment and the communication segment of LTTS. This divestment is part of LTTS's strategic pivot towards focusing on engineering intelligence. Further details regarding the transaction are expected to be disclosed in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Sancode Technologies Ltd - 543897 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure for acquisition of additional shareholding by making wholly owned subsidiary Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Sancode Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the acquisition of the remaining 1 Equity Share (0.01% stake) of Sancode Semi Private Limited. This acquisition makes Sancode Semi Private Limited a wholly-owned subsidiary of Sancode Technologies Limited, effective from March 25, 2026. The Board meeting commenced at 04:30 PM and concluded at 05:00 PM. Additional details as required by SEBI circular HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026, are enclosed as Annexure – I.

announcements.subject: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd - 543220 - Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal Order For Voluntary Liquidation Of ET Planners Private Limited
announcements.detail: Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal order for voluntary liquidation of ET Planners Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd has informed the exchange that ET Planners Private Limited, a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, has been dissolved as per an order passed by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi Bench, Court-VI. The NCLT order for the voluntary liquidation of ET Planners Private Limited was passed on March 25, 2026, and the company received the order on the same day at 6:00 pm (IST). This liquidation is not expected to have any material impact on the business, accounting policies, or financials of Max Healthcare Institute Ltd. The company had previously intimated about the ongoing voluntary liquidation on September 6, 2024, September 11, 2024, and October 18, 2024.

announcements.subject: NIS Management Ltd - 544495 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Award of Work Order to Subsidiary Company by Mumbai Police, Home Department, Government of Maharashtra.
announcements.ai_summary: NIS Management Ltd's subsidiary, NIS Facility Management Services Private Limited, has been awarded a work order by the Mumbai Police, Home Department, Government of Maharashtra. This order is for Project Planning and Management, Network Connectivity, Operation & Maintenance (O&M), and Warranty of CCTV Cameras. The total revenue expected from this work order is INR 2,18,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores Eighteen Lakhs Only), inclusive of all taxes. The company views this as a testament to its subsidiary's team's dedication and expertise and is excited about the collaboration with the Mumbai Police.

announcements.subject: LIC Housing Finance Ltd - 500253 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of LIC Housing Finance Ltd, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved a borrowing budget of Rs. 127,000 Crore for the Financial Year 2026-2027. This borrowing will be undertaken through various instruments including loans, redeemable non-convertible debentures, zero-couponed bonds, subordinate debt, Upper Tier II bonds, commercial paper, external commercial borrowing, bonds, foreign currency bonds, securitization by private placement or public issue, refinance from NHB, deposits from public and corporates, direct assignment, and other borrowing methods. The approval also includes proposed fundraising through these avenues. The Audit Committee had recommended this borrowing budget in their meeting on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Chatterbox Technologies Ltd - 544546 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Dated 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail:
inter-alia, considered the following businesses: 
1. Approved the utilization of CSR funds amounting to ?17,10,000/- (Rupees Seventeen Lakh Ten Thousand only) towards Corporate Social Responsibility activities through the implementing agency. 
2.Approved the change in the registered office of the Company within the local limits of the same city from 'Unit No. 101, VIP Plaza Co-operative Premises Society Ltd., Andheri New Link Road, Opp. Infinity ....
announcements.ai_summary: Chatterbox Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the utilization of CSR funds amounting to ₹17,10,000 (Rupees Seventeen Lakh Ten Thousand only) for Corporate Social Responsibility activities. The board also approved a change in the company's registered office within the local limits of Mumbai. The meeting was conducted via video conferencing.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - Intimation Of Sale And Transfer Of Three Wholly Owned Subsidiaries.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Sale and Transfer of Three Wholly Owned Subsidiaries.
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Ltd has informed the exchanges about the sale and transfer of its three wholly owned subsidiaries: GR Bilaspur Urga Highway Private Limited (GBUHPL), GR Ujjain Badnawar Highway Private Limited (GUBHPL), and GR Ena Kim Expressway Private Limited (GEKEPL). These subsidiaries have been transferred to Indus Infra Trust on March 25, 2026, after the receipt of consideration. Consequently, these entities will cease to be wholly owned subsidiaries of G R Infraprojects Ltd. GR Ena Kim Expressway Private Limited was a material subsidiary, and shareholder approval was sought via postal ballot.

announcements.subject: Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd - 544144 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 Regarding The Corporate Guarantee To Prabal Motors Private Limited And Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited, The Subsidiaries Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 regarding the Corporate Guarantee to Prabal Motors Private Limited and Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited, the subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd has renewed and extended corporate guarantees for its subsidiaries, Prabal Motors Private Limited and Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited. For Prabal Motors Private Limited, the company is extending a corporate guarantee in favour of IndusInd Bank Limited for credit facilities aggregating Rs.22,50,00,000 (Rupees Twenty-Two Crores Fifty Lakhs only), which includes Rs.15,00,00,000 for the Channel Financing Under CF Program with Daimler India Commercial Vehicle Private Limited and Rs.7,50,00,000 for ad-hoc facilities. Additionally, a corporate guarantee of up to Rs.2,00,00,000 (Rupees Two Crores only) is being extended in favour of Sundaram Finance Limited for a trade advance facility. For Popular Mega Motors (India) Private Limited, a corporate guarantee of up to Rs.5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crores only) is being extended in favour of Sundaram Finance Limited for a trade advance facility.

announcements.subject: IIRM Holdings India Ltd - 526530 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition by India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: IIRM Holdings India Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited, has acquired equity shares in Saferisk Insurance Brokers Private Limited. The target entity, Saferisk, had a turnover of Rs.27.78 crore and a net worth of Rs.17.91 crore in FY 2024-25, with a Profit After Tax (PAT) of Rs.1 crore for the same period. This acquisition is a continuation of previous disclosures made on July 31, 2025, and October 30, 2025. The specific details of the acquisition are provided in Annexure I, as per SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Gail (India) Ltd - 532155 - REVISION IN COMPLETION SCHEDULE FOR DURGAPUR - HALDIA & DHAMRA - HALDIA PIPELINE SECTIONS OF INTEGRATED JAGDISHPUR - HALDIA - BOKARO - DHAMRA PIPELINE PROJECT
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure pertaining to event or information as stipulated in Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: GAIL (India) Ltd has revised the completion schedule for the Durgapur – Haldia and Dhamra – Haldia pipeline sections of the integrated Jagdishpur – Haldia – Bokaro – Dhamra Pipeline Project. The balance sections for the Dhamra – Haldia Pipeline are now expected to be completed between March 2026 and September 2026, a revision from the previous March 2026 target. Similarly, the Kolkata – Haldia Section and the Dhamra – Haldia (West Bengal) section also have their completion dates revised to September 2026. The rationale for this delay is attributed to issues with Right of Use (RoU) and fisheries front availability. The Board of Directors approved this revision in their meeting held on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Welspun Living Ltd - 514162 -  Update On The  Acquisition Of Stake In Welspun Corporate Services Limited (Formerly Known As Welspun Home Textiles Limited)
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith intimation on Acquisition of stake in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (Formerly known as Welspun Home Textiles Limited)
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Living Ltd has completed the acquisition of 3,500 equity shares of Rs.10 each in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (formerly Welspun Home Textiles Limited) for a consideration of Rs.35,000. This acquisition represents 35% of the total paid-up equity share capital of Welspun Corporate Services Limited. Following this transaction, Welspun Corporate Services Limited has become an associate of Welspun Living Ltd. This update is in continuation of a previous disclosure made on March 19, 2026, regarding the initial agreement for this acquisition.

announcements.subject: RBL Bank Ltd - 540065 - RBL Bank Limited Informs The Exchange About Intimation Under SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited informs the exchange about update on disclosure made on October 18, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: RBL Bank Limited has provided an update regarding its earlier disclosure dated October 18, 2025. On March 25, 2026, the bank was informed by Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C) that it has received approval from the Central Bank of United Arab Emirates for its proposed acquisition of a majority stake in RBL Bank and the amalgamation of its existing Indian operations into the bank. This approval is contingent upon receiving all necessary regulatory approvals. The information is being hosted on the bank's website, www.rbl.bank.in, in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Update On Acquisition Of Minas De Revuboe Limitada
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition of 92.19% equity stake and shareholders loans of Minas de Revuboe Limitada
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Natural Resources Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of JSW Steel Ltd, has completed the acquisition of 92.19% of the equity stake and shareholders' loans of Minas de Revuboe Limitada (MdR). The transaction, which was finalized on March 25, 2026, involved the transfer of USD 74.24 million to designated escrow accounts, as per definitive agreements. This update follows previous intimations on May 17, 2024, January 28, 2025, and March 26, 2025. The disclosure will also be available on the company's website, www.jsw.in.

announcements.subject: Rajapalayam Mills Ltd-$ - 532503 - Announcement Under Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: The Company has submitted Corporate Guarantee to M/s. Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited pursuant to Board Approval dated 11-08-2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Rajapalayam Mills Ltd has submitted a Corporate Guarantee to M/s. Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited on behalf of M/s. Sandhya Spinning Mill Limited. This guarantee, valued at Rs. 40 Crores, was approved by the Board of Directors on August 11, 2025, and was submitted on March 25, 2026. The corporate guarantee is in connection with a loan facility sanctioned by M/s. Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited to M/s. Sandhya Spinning Mill Limited. The disclosure is made in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Affle 3I Ltd - 542752 - Intimaton Regarding Grant Of Patent In India
announcements.detail: Please refer to the letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Affle 3I Ltd (formerly Affle (India) Limited) announced on March 25, 2026, that it has been granted a new patent in India, which was previously granted in the US. This patent, titled "Method and system for establishing a decentralized repository of fraudulent IP addresses and publishers utilizing blockchain," strengthens the company's AI-powered consumer platform stack and its conversion-driven CPCU model. The patented technology establishes a blockchain-enabled, decentralized shared repository for fraud intelligence within the digital advertising ecosystem, allowing authorized participants to securely record, verify, and act on suspicious traffic signals.

announcements.subject: eMudhra Ltd - 543533 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: eMudhra Calls for Trust Infrastructure to Secure Digital Public Infrastructure at National Scale.
announcements.ai_summary: eMudhra Ltd has issued a press release on March 25, 2026, highlighting the critical need for robust trust infrastructure to secure national-scale digital public infrastructure. The company emphasizes that cryptographic trust infrastructure is essential for securing identity, transactions, and governance within digital ecosystems. This initiative aims to address the growing reliance on digital platforms for public services and transactions globally. The press release will be hosted on the company's website, www.emudhra.com, for public access and information.

announcements.subject: Welspun Corp Ltd - 532144 - Grant Of Stock Options-Welspun Corp Employee Benefit Scheme -2022
announcements.detail: Grant of Stock Options-Welspun Corp Employee Benefit Scheme-2022
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of Welspun Corp Ltd, at its meeting on March 25, 2026, granted 86,717 stock options to eligible employees under the Welspun Corp Employee Benefit Scheme – 2022. These options are implemented through the Welspun Corp Employees Welfare Trust and are in compliance with SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021. The options will vest over three years, with 30% vesting in the first year, 35% in the second, and 35% in the third, with the first vesting occurring one year from the grant date. The vested options can be exercised within one year from their respective vesting dates at an exercise price of Rs. 300 per option.

announcements.subject: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd - 512361 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Registration Of Land In The State Of Goa
announcements.detail: The Company has completed the execution and registration of a Sale Deed on March 24, 2026 for acquisition of land admeasuring 32,160 sq. meters in the state of Goa with the long term strategic objective of establishing substantial own production facilities and strengthening its position as a major player in the industry.
announcements.ai_summary: Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd has completed the acquisition of land in the state of Goa. The company executed and registered a Sale Deed on March 24, 2026, for land measuring 32,160 sq. meters. This acquisition is intended for establishing substantial own production facilities, specifically an alcobev manufacturing unit, to strengthen its position in the industry. The announcement is made under Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: AK Capital Services Ltd - 530499 -  Intimation For Allotment Of Commercial Papers
announcements.detail: The Banking and Investment Committee of the Company, approved the allotment of 100 units of Commercial Papers of face value of INR 5,00,000/- each, aggregating to INR 5,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Crores only).
announcements.ai_summary: AK Capital Services Limited's Banking and Investment Committee, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the allotment of 100 units of Commercial Papers (CPs). Each CP has a face value of INR 5,00,000/-, aggregating to INR 5,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Crores only). The CPs were issued on March 24, 2026, and are set to mature on October 15, 2026. The discount rate is 9.00% per annum, and the issue price per CP is INR 4,76,054/-. The Commercial Papers are proposed to be listed on BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: NHPC Ltd - 533098 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 25.03.2026
announcements.detail: In compliance to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, outcome of Board meeting held on 25.03.2026 for approval of borrowing plan for FY 2026-27 is submitted. The details are given in attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 25, 2026, from 5:15 PM to 6:45 PM. The Board approved the borrowing plan for the financial year 2026-27. The company plans to raise debt up to Rs. 8,000 crore during FY 2026-27 through secured or unsecured means, which may be redeemable. This outcome is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and follows an earlier intimation dated March 18, 2026.

announcements.subject: 3i Infotech Ltd - 532628 - Update On Disclosure Made Dated July 3, 2025 And November 27, 2025 Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Update on Disclosure made dated July 3, 2025 and November 27, 2025 under regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: 3i Infotech Ltd has provided an update on disclosures made on July 3, 2025, and November 27, 2025, concerning the "Direct Tax Vivad Se Vishwas Scheme, 2024." The material subsidiary, 3i Infotech Digital BPS Limited (formerly 3i Infotech BPO Limited), received a final order in Form 4 for the financial year 2013-14 from the CIT TDS 2, Delhi, dated March 23, 2026. This order confirms the status of the revised Form 2 issued on November 26, 2025. The event occurred on March 24, 2026, at 5:03 p.m. This intimation is also available on the company's website.

announcements.company: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd
announcements.subject: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd - 511243 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Enclosed Reg.30 intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Limited has been awarded a works contract for the construction of its Corporate Office building located at 18 & 18/1, Velachery Main Road, Guindy, Chennai – 600 032. The total consideration for this contract is Rs.540 crores. The contract has been awarded to M/s. Kalpataru Projects International Limited, a domestic entity. Further details as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations are provided in an annexure.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Update On Sale Of Undertaking
announcements.detail: Update on Sale of Undertaking
announcements.ai_summary: Josts Engineering Company Ltd has provided an update on the sale of its undertaking, specifically its 100% shareholding in its material subsidiary, JECL Engineering Limited (JECL). Following shareholder approval obtained through postal ballot on March 11, 2026, the company transferred its holding in JECL on March 24, 2026, upon receipt of the consideration, after necessary adjustments and deduction of a holdback amount. Definitive agreements were also entered into on March 24, 2026. Consequently, JECL has ceased to be a subsidiary of Josts Engineering Company Ltd effective from the end of the day on March 24, 2026. This follows prior intimations on February 5, 2026, and February 6, 2026, regarding the sale and the entry into a Share Purchase Agreement with Mr. Rahul Dhoot.

announcements.subject: Aion-Tech Solutions Ltd - 531439 - Announcement Under Reg 30 (LODR) For Change In Designation Of Mr. Chanakya Bellam Radha Krishna As Whole-Time Director, With Effect From May 01, 2026.
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR) for Change in Designation of Mr. Chanakya Bellam Radha Krishna as Whole-time Director, subject to the approval of members, with effect from May 01, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Aion-Tech Solutions Ltd, at their meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the change in designation of Mr. Chanakya Bellam Radha Krishna to Whole-time Director. This change is subject to the approval of the company's members and will be effective from May 01, 2026. The recommendation for this change was made by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Further details as required by SEBI regulations are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: ASI Industries Ltd - 502015 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on acqusition of unlisted shares.
announcements.ai_summary: ASI Industries Ltd has provided an update on its investment in M/s. Sunsure Solarpark Fifty Two Private Limited (“SSFTPL”) for the procurement of Solar Power. As part of the first tranche of the transaction, the company has subscribed to and been allotted 1308 fully paid equity shares of Rs 10/- each. These shares were allotted at a premium of Rs.1384/-, aggregating to Rs.18.23 lakhs. This update is a continuation of the company's previous letter dated February 10, 2026, regarding this investment.

announcements.subject: Bizotic Commercial Ltd - 543926 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E., Wednesday, 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: We hereby inform you that the Board of Directors, at its meeting held today, i.e., Wednesday, 25th March, 2026, at the Registered Office of the Company situated at 15, Ashwamegh Warehouses, Ujala Circle, Sarkhej, Ahmedabad, Dascroi, Gujarat, India - 382210, which commenced at 05:45 P.M. and concluded at 06:20 P.M., has considered and approved the receipt of the 5th tranche of consideration for the allotment of Convertible Warrants ('Warrants').
announcements.ai_summary: At a Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026, Bizotic Commercial Ltd approved the receipt of the 5th tranche of consideration for the allotment of Convertible Warrants. These warrants were issued at a price of Rs. 290.00/- each, which includes a premium of Rs. 280.00/- per warrant and a face value of Rs. 10.00/- per warrant. The warrants were issued on a preferential basis to persons/entities belonging to the “Promoter and Promoter Group Category” in accordance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. The company has received Rs. 6,71,56,000/- (Rupees Six Crores Seventy-One Lakhs Fifty-Six Thousand Only) as the 5th tranche of consideration from the allottees, including Ms. Sangita Annmo.

announcements.subject: JSW Cement Ltd - 544480 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Incorporation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary- JSW Cement Middleeast LLC-SPC
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Cement Limited has incorporated an overseas Wholly Owned Subsidiary named JSW CEMENT MIDDLEEAST L.L.C – SPC. This incorporation was done under the law of Fujairah, UAE, and falls under the jurisdiction of Fujairah Municipality. This announcement is a follow-up to the company's intimation dated February 4, 2026, regarding the planned incorporation of this subsidiary. The details of this incorporation are being provided in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of 75,00,000 Shares Upon Conversion Of Warrants Issued On Preferential Basis.
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on 25.03.2026 for allotment of 75 lakh shares upon conversion of warrants issued on preferential basis is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: At a Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026, Vardhman Polytex Ltd approved the allotment of 75,00,000 equity shares. These shares are fully paid-up, with a face value of Re.1/- each, and are allotted at a price of Rs.12.55 per share, which includes a premium of Rs. 11.55 per share. This allotment is a consequence of the conversion of 75,00,000 warrants that were previously issued on a preferential basis. The company had previously informed about the allotment of 7,24,50,000 convertible warrants on preferential basis at a price of Rs. 12.55 per warrant to an entity falling under the “Promoter Group”.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of New Branches
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 3 New Branches on March 25, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 935 Branches in total
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd announced the opening of three new branches on March 25, 2026. These new branches are located in Bharatpur, Rajasthan; Kondanagaram, Tamil Nadu; and Maravanmadam, Tamil Nadu. Following the opening of these branches, the total number of branches for City Union Bank Ltd now stands at 935. This expansion is in line with the bank's strategy to increase its reach and customer service points.
