announcements.subject: ABB India Ltd - 500002 - Disclosure Of Information As Per Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please refer enclosed file
announcements.ai_summary: ABB India Ltd has received an order from the Office of the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Bangalore, imposing a penalty of Rs. 17,68,303/- (Rupees Seventeen lakh sixty-eight thousand three hundred three) and a Redemption fine of Rs. 1,77,000/- (Rupees One lakh seventy-seven thousand only) under Section 114A of the Customs Act, 1962. The company plans to file an appeal against this order and is hopeful of a favorable outcome, not expecting any material impact on its operations. The disclosure was made on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Fredun Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 539730 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: Allotment of 1,06,668 Equity Shares to Promoter upon conversion of Warrants into Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Fredun Pharmaceuticals Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the allotment of 1,06,668 Equity Shares to a Promoter upon the conversion of warrants. These warrants were initially allotted on a preferential basis to Promoters on December 29, 2025, following shareholder approval on October 22, 2025. The warrant holders have paid the balance consideration aggregating to Rs. 10,00,01,250/- and exercised their right to convert 1,06,668 warrants into equity shares. The allotted equity shares have a face value of Rs. 10/- each.

announcements.subject: HFCL Ltd - 500183 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Board Of Directors Of The Company - Strategic Expansion And Consolidation Of Defence, Aeronautics And Aerostructure Business
announcements.detail: HFCL Limited ('HFCL'), pursuant to the approval of its Board of Directors at its meeting held today, has undertaken a major strategic initiative to expand and strengthen its Defence business, in line with its long-term growth strategy and evolving opportunities in the Defence sector including in Aeronautics and Aerostructure segments. The Board has also approved the delivery and performance of a memorandum of understanding ('MOU') signed by and amongst ....
announcements.ai_summary: HFCL Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved a significant strategic initiative to expand and strengthen its Defence business. This expansion will also encompass the Aeronautics and Aerostructure segments, aligning with the company's long-term growth strategy and the evolving opportunities in the Defence sector. The Board also approved the delivery and performance of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) signed amongst HFCL, HFCL Advance Systems Private Limited (HASPL), and another party. The board meeting commenced at 3:00 p.m. and concluded at 4:45 p.m.

announcements.subject: Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd-$ - 532467 - Providing Corporate Guarantee
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that the Company has provided Corporate Guarantee in  favour of Square Port Shipyard Private Limited (Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company)
announcements.ai_summary: Hazoor Multi Projects Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the provision of a Corporate Guarantee in favor of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Square Port Shipyard Private Limited. This guarantee is intended to secure credit facilities from Bank of Baroda. The facilities include a term loan of Rs. 45,00,00,000 (Rupees Forty-Five Crores) and a cash credit facility of Rs. 5,00,00,000 (Indian Rupees Five Crores). The Board meeting commenced at 4:00 pm and concluded at 5:30 pm on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Welspun Enterprises Ltd - 532553 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update:- Completion of acquisition of Welspun Corporate Services Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Enterprises Ltd has successfully completed the acquisition of 2,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each in Welspun Corporate Services Limited (WCSL), formerly known as Welspun Home Textiles Limited. This acquisition represents 20% of WCSL's total paid-up equity share capital and was completed at a consideration of Rs. 20,000. Following this transaction, Welspun Enterprises Ltd now holds a 20% equity stake in WCSL, making WCSL an associate of the company. This update follows the company's previous disclosure on March 19, 2026, regarding this acquisition.

announcements.subject: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd - 544526 - Allocation Of Land By Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited , Material Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: Allocation of land by Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited , material subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd's material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has entered into a lease deed with M P Industrial Development Corporation Limited. This lease is for 185 acres of land, approximately 748,668 square meters, located in the Manufacturing Zone for Power and Renewable Energy Equipment in Narmadapuram. The lease agreement has a tenor of 99 years. This land acquisition by the subsidiary is a significant development for Saatvik Green Energy Ltd's operational expansion.

announcements.subject: Fineotex Chemical Ltd - 533333 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Fineotex Chemical Limited has issued a press release announcing the expansion of its global footprint through an additional 15-acre facility in Midland, Texas, USA. This strategic expansion, located in the Permian Basin, is a significant step in the company's global growth strategy. The new facility will strengthen CrudeChem Technology's presence in a key energy hub. The press release is dated March 25, 2026, and is available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Gem Aromatics Ltd - 544491 - Disclosure Received Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: Disclosure received under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Gem Aromatics Limited has informed the exchange that it has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure has been made by Designated Person(s) in compliance with the said regulations. The company has enclosed Annexure-A, which contains the details of this disclosure, for the record of the exchange.

announcements.subject: Modi Naturals Ltd - 519003 - Commencement Of Commercial Operations At Expanded Ethanol Plant Of Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Commencement of Commercial Operations at Expanded Ethanol Plant of Subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: Modi Naturals Ltd has announced the commencement of commercial operations at the expanded ethanol plant of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Modi Biotech Private Limited, located in Chhattisgarh. The plant's installed capacity has been significantly increased from 130 KLPD to 282 KLPD. This expansion aligns with the company's strategy to strengthen its presence in the ethanol segment and support the Government of India's Ethanol Blended Petrol (EBP) Programme. The increased capacity is expected to enhance operational efficiencies and boost production volumes.

announcements.subject: Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd - 526365 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer for the attention of the Public Shareholders Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer to the BSE for the attention of public shareholders of Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd. The offer is being made by Mr. Mahendra Madanlal Chordia, Mrs. Asha M. Chordia, Mr. Sunny Mahendra Chordia, and Swarnsarita Jewellers Private Limited (SJPL) as the Acquirers. They intend to acquire up to 47,94,987 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹10 each, representing 22.97% of the Target Company's voting share capital. The open offer price is set at ₹32.15 per equity share.

announcements.subject: LCC Infotech Ltd - 532019 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Grow House Wealth Management Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer for the attention of the Public Shareholders of LCC Infotech Ltd ("Target Company").

This pertains to an Open Offer for the acquisition of 4,38,34,271 Equity Shares of LCC Infotech Ltd, representing 26.00% of the Emerging Voting Share Capital. The Offer Price is Rs. 4.55 per Equity Share. This offer is being made by Mr. Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel, the Acquirer, in compliance with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Letter of Offer is dated March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Manaksia Steels Ltd - 539044 - Proposed Capacity Expansion For Production Of Cold Rolled Coils At Haldia, West Bengal
announcements.detail: Proposed capacity expansion for production of Cold Rolled Coils at Haldia, West Bengal
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Manaksia Steels Ltd is proposing a capacity expansion for the production of Cold Rolled Coils at its existing unit in Haldia, West Bengal. This expansion will be achieved through the introduction of a "6-Hi Reversible Cold Rolling Mill." The company informed the stock exchanges about this proposed capacity addition on March 25, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Para B of Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Detailed disclosure as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/ HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/ I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026, is enclosed as Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Borana Weaves Ltd - 544404 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Borana Weaves Ltd has successfully commissioned its 3.545 MW rooftop solar power project ahead of the scheduled timeline. This development, announced via a press release on March 25, 2026, increases the company’s total installed capacity and advances its planned expansion for FY 2025-26. The press release details the integration of renewable energy and the completion of capacity expansion. This information is available on the company's website and the websites of the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Nexus Select Trust - 543913 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Nexus Select Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Nexus Select Mall Management Private Limited, the Manager to Nexus Select Trust, met on March 25, 2026. During the meeting, they approved an amendment to the Debenture Trust Deed dated December 09, 2025. This deed was entered into between Nexus Select Trust (acting through its Manager) and IDBI Trusteeship Services. The approval is in accordance with Regulation 51 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and Regulation 23(5) of SEBI (Real Estate Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014.

announcements.subject: Indo Thai Securities Ltd - 533676 - Disclosure Of The Material Information About Indo Thai Financial Services Limited
announcements.detail: Please refer the attached document.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indo Thai Securities Limited, as the Demerged Company, is disclosing material information about Indo Thai Financial Services Limited, the Resulting Company, as per observation letters from NSE and BSE dated March 18, 2026. This is in relation to the Scheme of Arrangement under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The Resulting Company, Indo Thai Financial Services Limited, has increased its Authorized Share Capital from Rs. 30,00,000 (Rupees Thirty Lakhs) divided into 30,000 shares. This disclosure is in addition to the requirements for subsidiaries under SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Rain Industries Ltd - 500339 - Rain Industries Limited  - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 - Acquisition Of Shares
announcements.detail: Rain Industries Limited - Disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SWEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 - Acquisition of Shares

This acquisition is disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The exact number of shares acquired and the resulting percentage of total voting capital before and after the transaction are detailed in the disclosure submitted by Nivee Holdings Private Limited. This filing is for the information and records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: RRP Defense Ltd - 530929 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached the Company''s press release announcing that Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) and RRP Group have signed a strategic MoU to collaborate in semiconductors, unmanned systems, and electro-optical technologies.
announcements.ai_summary: RRP Defense Ltd has announced the signing of a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) and the RRP Group. This collaboration aims to advance joint efforts in the fields of semiconductors, unmanned systems, and electro-optical technologies. The press release, dated March 24, 2026, was issued by RRP Defense Ltd (formerly Euro Asia Exports Limited) and was submitted to the Bombay Stock Exchange on March 25, 2026. This MoU signifies a partnership to explore and develop capabilities in these critical defense and technology sectors.

announcements.subject: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd - 500184 - Intimation of Repayment of Commercial Paper (CP)
announcements.detail: Redemption of Commercial Paper amounting to Rs 200 Crores
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd certified that it has made full and timely repayment to the holders of its Commercial Paper (CP) amounting to Rs. 200 Crores. This repayment was made in accordance with the terms and conditions of issuance. The CP had a maturity date of March 26, 2026, and the redemption occurred on March 25, 2026. This disclosure is made pursuant to SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHSPoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025, regarding the issue and listing of Non-Convertible Securities, Securitized Debt Instruments, Security Receipts, Municipal Debt Securities, and Commercial Papers.

announcements.subject: Coal India Ltd - 533278 - Initial Public Offering ('IPO') Of Equity Shares Of Face Value ? 2 Each ('Equity Shares') Of Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited, A Subsidiary Of Coal India Limited ('Company')-Filing Of Prospectus
announcements.detail: CMPDIL has filed prospectus with RoC, Ranchi on 25.03.26
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, Coal India Limited announced that its subsidiary, Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited (CMPDIL), has filed its prospectus with the Registrar of Companies (RoC), Ranchi. This filing is in furtherance of the disclosures made by Coal India Limited on March 13, 2026, and pertains to the Initial Public Offering (IPO) of equity shares of CMPDIL. The equity shares of CMPDIL have a face value of ₹ 2 each. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Capri Global Capital Ltd - 531595 - Intimation Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Approved the establishment of GMTN Programme
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, the Management Committee of Capri Global Capital Limited authorized certain officers to establish a global medium-term note programme (GMTN Programme). This programme will be for an aggregate amount not exceeding USD 1 billion, in accordance with Regulation S and/or Rule 144A of the U.S. Securities Act, 1933. The authorization was granted by the Committee at its meeting held on March 25, 2026, pursuant to authority delegated by the Board of Directors on January 29, 2026. This intimation is made under Regulations 30 and 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: HBL Engineering Ltd-$ - 517271 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Joint Venture
announcements.detail: Please refer to the attached file.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, HBL Engineering Limited (HBL) executed a Joint Venture Agreement with Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL). This agreement formalizes the proposal, previously approved by HBL's Board of Directors on February 07, 2026, to form a joint venture company. The purpose of this joint venture is to develop electric mobility technology and energy storage solutions within the maritime space. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: RACL Geartech Ltd - 520073 - General Update
announcements.detail:
The Company wishes to inform that there have been intermittent constraints in the availability of LPG/PNG/CNG for Industrial usage. 


Kindly take above information on record and oblige.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, RACL Geartech Ltd informed stakeholders about intermittent constraints in the availability of LPG, PNG, and CNG for industrial usage, which are essential inputs for its manufacturing processes and those of its sub-suppliers. These constraints have led to limited operational disruptions during the current month. The company is coordinating with suppliers and has implemented alternate production planning and contingency measures to mitigate the impact. While these temporary constraints may have a limited effect on production schedules for the month, the company expects operations to align as supplies stabilize. The company continues to monitor the situation, noting that demand remains robust.

announcements.subject: Power Mech Projects Ltd - 539302 - Intimation Regarding Annulment Of Tender And Cancellation Of Letter Of Award Issued To PM Green Private Limited (One Of The Wholly Owned Subsidiaries Of The Company).
announcements.detail: Please find the attached
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, Power Mech Projects Ltd announced the annulment of a tender and the cancellation of a Letter of Award (LoA) previously issued to its wholly owned subsidiary, PM Green Private Limited. The annulment was initiated by West Bengal State Electricity Distribution Company Limited (WBSEDCL) for a 250 MW/1000 MWh Standalone Battery Energy Storage System project. The reason cited for the annulment was administrative and procedural exigencies beyond the control of either party, and not due to any default by the subsidiary. Consequently, the Bid Security and Performance Bank Guarantee submitted by PM Green Private Limited have been released in full. This cancellation will reduce the company's order book value by Rs. 1,563 crores.

announcements.subject: Exide Industries Ltd - 500086 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed letter w.r.t further investment in Exide Energy Solutions Limited, wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, Exide Industries Limited (EIL) made a further investment of Rs. 450,00,00,000/- (Rupees Four Hundred Fifty crores only) in its wholly owned subsidiary, Exide Energy Solutions Limited (EESL), through a subscription in the equity share capital on a rights basis. Following this investment, EIL's total investment in EESL now stands at Rs. 4,802.23 crore. Importantly, this acquisition did not result in any change to Exide Industries Limited's shareholding percentage in EESL, which continues to be a wholly owned subsidiary.

announcements.subject: Global Health Ltd - 543654 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release dated March 25, 2026 titled " Medanta to set up a 400 bed hospital in the centre of Varanasi, further strengthening its Uttar Pradesh footprint".
announcements.ai_summary: Global Health Limited (GHL) has issued a press release dated March 25, 2026, titled "Medanta to set up a 400 bed hospital in the centre of Varanasi, further strengthening its Uttar Pradesh footprint." This announcement was considered and approved by the Board of Directors of Global Health Limited at their meeting held on March 25, 2026. The press release details the company's expansion plans in Uttar Pradesh. The Board also noted the incorporation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Global Health Institute of Medical Sciences Foundation, a Section 8 Company, on March 30, 2024, for educational and healthcare management training.

announcements.subject: Cochin Shipyard Ltd - 540678 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Joint Venture
announcements.detail: Please refer attachment
announcements.ai_summary: Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) has executed a Joint Venture Agreement with HBL Engineering Limited (HBL) on March 25, 2026. This agreement formalizes the formation of a Joint Venture Company aimed at developing electric mobility technology and energy storage solutions in the maritime space. This follows the Board of Directors' approval for this proposal on January 28, 2026. The company has submitted the requisite details as per Regulation 30 read with Para B of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI LODR Regulations and the relevant SEBI Master Circular. This JV represents a strategic step towards innovation in the maritime sector.

announcements.subject: Saboo Sodium Chloro Ltd - 530461 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: As per attached PDF.
announcements.ai_summary: Saboo Sodium Chloro Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the subscription to the Rights Issue of its wholly owned subsidiary, Samskara Resorts Private Limited (WOS). The company will subscribe to its 100% entitlement in the Rights Issue, with an aggregate investment not exceeding ₹3,80,00,000 (Rupees Three Crore Eighty Lakhs). This decision was made to support the subsidiary's capital requirements. The Board meeting concluded at 3:30 PM on the same day. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this approval as per the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Bharat Dynamics Ltd - 541143 - General Updates
announcements.detail: General updates on Additional manufacturing facilities
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Dynamics Ltd (BDL) has provided general updates on its expansion plans, specifically regarding the establishment of two additional manufacturing facilities. These facilities are being set up at Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad, Telangana, and Jhansi, Uttar Pradesh, to meet the current scenario and requirements of the Indian armed forces. The inauguration of these facilities is scheduled to take place shortly, with production commencement expected during the financial year 2026-27. These new facilities are intended to help BDL meet additional requirements, expand capacity, enhance operational efficiency, and diversify its product profile. The facility at Ibrahimpatnam will include eight assembly lines.

announcements.subject: Markolines Pavement Technologies Ltd - 543364 - Clarification Regarding Share Exchange Ratio Mentioned In Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 6Th March 2026
announcements.detail: The correct share exchange ratio approved by the Board in its meeting held on 6th March, 2026 and as per the latest valuation report is: 1:1.05 i.e. for every one existing equity share of Markolines Infra Limited, shareholder will receive 1.05 equity shares of Markolines Pavement Technologies Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Markolines Pavement Technologies Ltd has issued a clarification regarding the share exchange ratio approved in its Board Meeting held on March 6, 2026. The correct share exchange ratio for the Scheme of Amalgamation of Markolines Infra Limited with Markolines Pavement Technologies Limited is 1:1.05. This means that for every one existing equity share of Markolines Infra Limited, shareholders will receive 1.05 equity shares of Markolines Pavement Technologies Limited. The company stated that the previously mentioned ratio of 1:1.15 was due to an inadvertent clerical error. This corrected ratio is based on the latest valuation report and has been submitted to the stock exchanges for their records.

announcements.subject: SKF India Ltd - 500472 - Intimation Regarding Change In Name Of Promoter Entity.
announcements.detail: The company informs the BSE that the name of the promoter entity of the company has been changed from ''SKF Interim AB'' to ''SKF Vertevo AB''.
announcements.ai_summary: SKF India Ltd has announced a change in the name of its promoter entity from 'SKF Interim AB' to 'SKF Vertevo AB', effective March 25, 2026. This name change is part of a broader global rebranding initiative resulting from the demerger of the company's Automotive and Industrial businesses. The company has clarified that this modification is solely a name change and does not involve any alteration in shareholding or the promoter's status. SKF India Ltd is in the process of updating the new name with relevant regulatory authorities. While not considered material information under SEBI LODR Regulations, the disclosure is made voluntarily as a matter of good corporate governance.

announcements.subject: DSM Fresh Foods Ltd - 544568 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: DSM Fresh Foods Limited signed MoU with a farm operator in Ghaziabad as a part of its strategy to strengthen backward intigration
announcements.ai_summary: DSM Fresh Foods Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with a farm operator located in Ghaziabad on March 25, 2026. This agreement is a strategic move by the company to strengthen its backward integration and build a more reliable sourcing ecosystem for its operations. The partnership will involve approximately 50 acres of aquaculture farms in Village Masurie, Ghaziabad, and aims to enhance the quality, traceability, and consistency of its fish supply. This initiative is part of DSM Fresh Foods' strategy to meet the growing demand for safe and hygienic food products and build a transparent farm-to-fork supply chain. The company has submitted a press release detailing this development to the stock exchanges for their record.

announcements.subject: Magellanic Cloud Ltd - 538891 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Attached herewith is the LOA received of worth Rs. 2 Crore by our wholly owned subsidiary- Provigil Survelliance Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Magellanic Cloud Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Provigil Surveillance Limited, has received a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from Central Railway, Bhusawal Division. The contract is valued at approximately INR 2 Crore and involves the supply, installation, commissioning, and maintenance of CCTV cameras mounted on metallic poles. The video data will be stored in Network Video Recorders (NVRs) installed inside LC Gate buildings at each station.

announcements.subject:
Abate As Industries Ltd - 531658 - Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of The SEBI( Substantial
Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Abate As Industries Limited has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure, dated March 24, 2026, pertains to the acquisition of shares by ASYA, who is acting in concert with the acquirer and belongs to the Promoter/Promoter group. The target company is Abate As Industries Limited, and its shares are listed on BSE Limited. The disclosure details the holdings before the acquisition under consideration.

announcements.subject: Praruh Technologies Ltd - 544538 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: We have received PO worth Rs.38,98,16,753.90/- from Railtel, who is implementing an optical fiber-based Metro-DWDM System with new generation optical networking systems (SDN based). The desired network should accommodate the growing demand for bandwidth, while maintaining compatibility and enhanced flexibility to transport and route all traffic types DWDM.
announcements.ai_summary: Praruh Technologies Limited has received a Purchase Order (PO) worth Rs. 38,98,16,753.90 from RailTel Corporation of India Ltd. The order is for the Design, Supply, Installation, Testing & Commissioning of an MDWDM system, including integration with RailTel's existing network. This system is intended to accommodate growing bandwidth demands while maintaining compatibility and flexibility for transporting and routing all traffic types. The order is from a domestic entity.

announcements.subject: Afcons Infrastructure Ltd - 544280 - Intimation of Repayment of Commercial Paper (CP)
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation with respect to redemption of Commercial Paper
announcements.ai_summary: Afcons Infrastructure Limited has announced the full redemption of its Commercial Paper (CP) amounting to Rs. 30 Crores. The CP, bearing ISIN INE101I14ES8, was originally issued on November 14, 2025. The redemption occurred on March 25, 2026, which was the maturity date of the Commercial Paper. This information is provided for the records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Burnpur Cement Ltd - 532931 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Approval Of Waiver From BSE Limited Pertaining To Reg 17(1A) Of The SEBI LODR Regulation 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Waiver approval from BSE pertaining to Reg 17(1A) of the SEBI (LODR) Regylation 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Burnpur Cement Limited has received approval for a waiver of penalty from BSE Limited. This waiver pertains to Regulation 17(1A) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The penalty of Rs. 1,55,760 (including GST) was levied by BSE Limited for non-compliance during the quarter ended June 30, 2025. The company had previously communicated about this fine on August 30, 2025, and September 15, 2025. The approval for the waiver was received via email from BSE Limited on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd - 544225 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the exchange regarding a Press Release dated March 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has issued a press release dated March 25, 2026, announcing the expansion of its 'Ola Insiders' upgrade program to over 150 cities. This expansion follows a strong initial traction for the program, with over 50,000 customers expressing significant interest within days of its launch. The press release details the program's success and its wider rollout. The company will also host this announcement on its website, www.olaelectric.com.

announcements.subject: Ravindra Energy Ltd - 504341 - Ravindra Energy Limited Has Informed The Exchange About General Business Update Regarding Its Associate Entity - Energy In Motion Limited
announcements.detail: We would like to inform our stakeholders about General Business Update regarding REL''s associate entity Energy In Motion Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Ravindra Energy Limited's associate entity, Energy In Motion Limited (EIM), has partnered with Transvolt Mobility Private Limited (Transvolt) for the deployment of 66 electric heavy vehicles. EIM will supply its Foton 55-ton e-tractor "Ashwa," which is a battery-swappable heavy electric vehicle. In addition to vehicle supply, EIM will provide swappable battery and charging services to Transvolt for these vehicles. The full supply of these 66 vehicles is expected to be completed in March and April 2026. Transvolt will deploy these vehicles at Kandla Port in Gujarat and Jawaharlal Nehru Port in Mumbai for the intra-port movement of containerized goods. This deployment is anticipated to reduce CO2 emissions by approximately 3300 tons annually and aligns with the objective of achieving 100% zero-emission transport at port terminals.

announcements.subject: Dc Infotech and Communication Ltd - 543636 - Media Release For Extending Agreement With Tata Communications Limited For Three Years
announcements.detail: Media Release for Extending Agreement with Tata Communication Limited for three years
announcements.ai_summary: DC Infotech and Communication Limited announced on March 25, 2026, the extension of its Procurement Agreement (Reseller) with Tata Communications Limited for a period of three years. The renewed agreement will be effective from March 05, 2026, through March 04, 2029. This extension ensures the continuity of the strategic relationship between the two companies, reinforcing DC Infotech's commitment to delivering advanced technology solutions. DC Infotech is a provider of IT, networking, and digital infrastructure solutions, while Tata Communications is a global digital infrastructure provider.

announcements.subject: Nagarjuna Fertilizers and Chemicals Ltd - 539917 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail:
We wish to inform that Adjudication Proceeding were initiated by SEBI in relation to an Arbitration Award and its disclosure requirements passed in favour of an Operational Creditor.

The Company made its Submissions before the Adjudication Officer and were considered by the Adjucation Officer and felt appropriate to levy penalty of Rs. 1,00,000/- only commensurate with the nature of violation and to act as deterrence to the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Nagarjuna Fertilizers and Chemicals Ltd has been penalized Rs. 1,00,000/- by the Adjudicating Officer of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI). This penalty stems from adjudication proceedings initiated by SEBI concerning an Arbitration Award and its disclosure requirements, which were passed in favor of an Operational Creditor. The company made submissions before the Adjudication Officer, which were considered before the penalty was levied on March 25, 2026. The penalty is intended to be commensurate with the nature of the violation and act as a deterrence.

announcements.subject: Hinduja Global Solutions Ltd - 532859 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - HGS Brings Certainty to AI-Led Transformation with Intelligent Experience. (attached)
announcements.ai_summary: Hinduja Global Solutions Ltd issued a press release on March 25, 2026, titled "HGS Brings Certainty to AI-Led Transformation with Intelligent Experience." The press release, which is self-explanatory, details how HGS is helping enterprises achieve measurable results at scale through AI-led transformation. The event occurred on March 25, 2026, at 1:32 p.m. The company is a global provider of technology, AI, and business services.

announcements.subject: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd - 524136 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Meeting Updates
announcements.detail: APPROVAL OF INCORPORATION OF WHOLLY OWNED SUBSIDIARY
announcements.ai_summary: On March 25, 2026, the Executive Committee of the Board of Directors of Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd approved the incorporation of a new Wholly Owned Subsidiary named "Abhaya Nourishtech Limited." This decision was made under the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, and in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations. The meeting of the Executive Committee commenced at 1:00 p.m. (IST) and concluded at 1:50 p.m. (IST). Further disclosures required by SEBI are provided in Annexure-A, and the information is also being uploaded to the company's website, www.peececosma.com.

announcements.subject: Omaxe Ltd - 532880 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith the copy of intimation w.r.t. Press Release being released to the media.
announcements.ai_summary: Omaxe Ltd has released a press release on March 25, 2026, announcing that a stand at the cricket stadium in The Omaxe State, Dwarka, will be named after Harmanpreet Kaur, Captain of the Indian Women's Cricket Team. This is part of the development of a 30,000-seater venue at Delhi's largest integrated sports destination. Global design firm Bentel Associates has been appointed to masterplan the project's commercial, retail, hotel, and club components. Investors should note this branding initiative and its association with a prominent sports figure.

announcements.subject: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd - 517334 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted a Press Release with the Stock Exchange regarding execution of Joint Venture Agreement with Hellmann Worldwide Logistics (MESA) Holding Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited (SAMIL) has executed a Joint Venture Agreement (JVA) with Hellmann Worldwide Logistics (MESA) Holding Limited, a company based in Dubai. This JV, announced on March 25, 2026, aims to leverage SAMIL's Logistics Solution Division to provide world-class supply chain solutions to the automotive industry and customers with critical logistics needs, enhancing supply chain resilience and stability. This follows SAMIL's disclosure on March 19, 2026, regarding the strategic joint venture. Investors should analyze the terms of the JVA and the potential market impact of this collaboration.

announcements.subject: Mysore Paper Mills Ltd - 502405 - Board Meeting Outcome for Un-Audited Financial Result For The Quarter End 31-12-2025
announcements.detail: Out come of Board Meeting for the quarter end 31-12-2025 held today.
announcements.ai_summary: The Mysore Paper Mills Limited announced on March 25, 2026, that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held from 11:00 am to 1:15 pm, approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. A copy of these results has been submitted to the stock exchanges. Investors should review these financial results to assess the company's performance during the quarter.

announcements.subject: Pakka Ltd-$ - 516030 - Approval Of Letter Of Comfort (LOC) By The Uttar Pradesh Cabinet For Availing Fiscal Incentive Of 'Jagriti Project' Of The Company Under Uttar Pradesh Industrial Investment And Employment Promotion Policy, 2022
announcements.detail: Kindly find attached herewith Intimation for Approval of Letter of Comfort (LOC) by the Uttar Pradesh Cabinet.
announcements.ai_summary: Pakka Limited has received approval from the Uttar Pradesh Cabinet for a Letter of Comfort (LOC) to avail fiscal incentives for its 'Jagriti Project' under the Uttar Pradesh Industrial Investment and Employment Promotion Policy, 2022. The company had applied for fiscal incentives totaling Rs. 224.47 crores on July 23, 2025, for investments in the 'Jagriti Project'. The Uttar Pradesh Cabinet Committee approved the LOC in a meeting held on March 23, 2026, following up on the company's disclosure from September 16, 2025. Investors should track the disbursement and utilization of these incentives.

announcements.subject: NACL Industries Ltd - 524709 - Announcement Under Regulation 30- Corporate Annoucement
announcements.detail: NACL Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Regulation 30 Announcement - Corporate Announcement
announcements.ai_summary: NACL Industries Limited announced on March 25, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved the conversion of an existing inter-corporate loan extended to its subsidiary, NACL Spec-Chem Limited, into Compulsorily Convertible Debentures (CCDs). This financial restructuring pertains to the company's existing exposure in the subsidiary and does not involve any new funding. Investors should understand the terms of these CCDs, including conversion ratios and maturity dates, to assess their impact on NACL Industries' balance sheet and the subsidiary's financial structure.

announcements.subject: Paisalo Digital Ltd - 532900 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Paisalo Digital Limited has announced its appointment as a Business Correspondent (BC) partner for Indian Overseas Bank (IOB), as detailed in a press release dated March 25, 2026. This new partnership significantly expands Paisalo's Banking-as-a-Service (BaaS) platform, complementing its existing BC relationships with State Bank of India (SBI) and Bank of India (BOI). This move is expected to strengthen Paisalo's last-mile financial inclusion footprint. Investors should monitor the impact of this expanded partnership on Paisalo's customer reach and service offerings.

announcements.subject: Meghmani Organics Ltd - 543331 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on EcoVadis Silver Medal
announcements.ai_summary: Meghmani Organics Limited (MOL) has been awarded a Silver Medal by EcoVadis, a leading business sustainability rating provider. This recognition places MOL in the top 4% of companies within its industry segment and the top 15% globally among over 150,000 evaluated companies. The award, announced on March 25, 2026, validates MOL's integrated approach to Responsible Care, ESG governance, and operational excellence, particularly in environment, labor and human rights, ethics, and sustainable procurement. Investors can view this as a positive indicator of the company's commitment to sustainability.

announcements.subject: Puravankara Ltd - 532891 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release titled "Puravankara unveils portfolio of 30 projects across South India and Mumbai with a GDV of over Rs. 55,000 Crores in the next 24 Months"
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Ltd has announced plans to launch 30 new projects across South India and Mumbai within the next 24 months, with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) exceeding Rs. 55,000 Crores. This significant expansion aims to bolster the company's real estate portfolio. In addition to its development plans, Puravankara Ltd has committed to planting 1 million trees by 2030 as part of the World Economic Forum’s 1t.org initiative, underscoring its sustainability efforts. The announcement was made on March 25, 2026. Investors should monitor the progress and execution of these new projects and the company's environmental initiatives.

announcements.subject: Adani Enterprises Ltd - 512599 - Intimation Of Early Full Redemption Of Ncds By The Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation of early redemption by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Ltd has completed the early full redemption of certain unlisted, secured, unrated, redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). The company made the payment of the due consideration on March 25, 2026, as agreed with the debenture holders and the debenture trustee. This redemption pertains to NCDs with ISIN INE423A07294, amounting to Rs. 1250,00,00,000, issued on July 11, 2023, and ISIN INE423A07302, amounting to Rs. 700,00,00,000, issued on October 11, 2023. This action follows the Board of Directors' Management Committee meeting on March 24, 2026, which approved the early redemption.

announcements.subject: Caprihans India Ltd-$ - 509486 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Conversion of Securities
announcements.detail: Caprihans India Limited has informed the Exchange about allotment of 3,30,000 Equity Shares upon conversion of Warrants, to Bilcare Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Caprihans India Limited has informed the exchange about the allotment of 3,30,000 Equity Shares upon the conversion of warrants. These shares have been allotted to Bilcare Limited, the promoter of the company. The warrants were issued on a preferential basis, with shareholder approval obtained on November 8, 2024. The Board of Directors had previously approved the allotment of 48,00,000 warrants at Rs. 200 per warrant to Bilcare Limited. This allotment follows previous disclosures regarding the conversion of warrants into equity shares on various dates, including January 10, 2025, January 17, 2025, January 20, 2025, March 20, 2026, March 23, 2026, and March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Mukka Proteins Ltd - 544135 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation of execution of Share Purchase Agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: Mukka Proteins Limited has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on March 25, 2026, with Mr. Kalandan Mohammed Haris, Mr. Kalandan Mohammed Althaf, Mr. Kalandan Mohammad Arif, and Mr. Kalandan Abdul Razak. This agreement is for the acquisition of the remaining 2% equity share capital of Haris Marine Products Private Limited, the investee company. This follows an earlier intimation on February 12, 2026, regarding the acquisition of additional equity shares in the same company. The disclosure required under Schedule III of the Listing Regulations, read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023, has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Milkfood Ltd - 507621 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Fresh Agreement to sell dated March 24, 2026 for the sale of its property situated at Village Agwanpur, Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh, measuring 20.084 acres.
announcements.ai_summary: Milkfood Ltd has entered into a fresh agreement to sell its property located in Village Agwanpur, Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh, measuring 20.084 acres. This agreement, dated March 24, 2026, replaces a previous one from January 16, 2026. The property will be sold to M/s Bareilly Dairies Limited, Ms. Poonam Aggarwal, Mr. Amit Aggarwal, Ms. Shally Aggarwal, and Mr. Mool Chand Aggarwal for a total consideration of Rs. 130 Crores. The net sale proceeds are intended to be used for reducing borrowings and for business development activities of Milkfood Ltd. The buyers are not related to the promoters or promoter group.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Press Release - Update On Referral Lending Business Performance
announcements.detail: Update on Referral Business Performance
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Ltd has issued a press release on March 25, 2026, detailing a strong surge in its referral loan disbursements for the fourth quarter of Fiscal Year 2026. The announcement, available on the bank's website, highlights the performance of its referral lending business. The company, registered at Mindspace Juinagar, Navi Mumbai, is providing this update as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release, titled “Fino Payments Bank Sees Strong Surge in Q4 FY26 Referral Loan Disbursements,” is being filed with both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. Investors can find further details on the bank's website, www.fino.bank.in.

announcements.subject: Kerala Ayurveda Ltd - 530163 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board on 25-03-2026
announcements.ai_summary: Kerala Ayurveda Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the issuance of 4,000 Series “A” unlisted, secured, and redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of ₹1,00,000/-, resulting in an aggregate amount of ₹40,00,00,000/- (Rupees Forty Crores only) being raised at par on a Private Placement Basis. This borrowing is within the limits approved by shareholders on 22nd August 2025, under Section 180(1)(c) of the Companies Act, 2013. The board meeting commenced at 10:30 AM and concluded at 12:25 PM.

announcements.subject: LE Lavoir Ltd - 539814 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E., Wednesday, 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: We hereby inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company, at its meeting held today, i.e., Wednesday, 25th March, 2026, at the registered office of the Company situated at 1st Floor, Shop No. 105, Four Square Plaza, UNI. Road, Rajkot Sau Uni Area, Rajkot, Gujarat, India - 360 005, which commenced at 11:00 A.M. and concluded at 11:30 A.M., has considered and approved the Receipt of the 3rd tranche of consideration for allotment of convertible warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: LE Lavoir Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the receipt of the 3rd tranche of consideration for the allotment of convertible warrants. These warrants were issued at a price of ₹264.75 each, comprising a face value of ₹10.00 and a premium of ₹254.75 per warrant. The allotment was made on a preferential basis for cash consideration to persons/entities in the "Non-Promoter" category, in accordance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. The board meeting commenced at 11:00 AM and concluded at 11:30 AM at the company's registered office in Rajkot, Gujarat.

announcements.subject: Identixweb Ltd - 544388 - Intimation Of Product Innovation Announcement - Sitegrowth AI
announcements.detail:
We hereby submit that the Company has initiated the commencement of Research & Development of "SiteGrowth AI" - An AI-Powered Organic Growth Engine for SaaS & Business Websites. 
The Company will Suitably notify the stakeholders once the product is launched.
announcements.ai_summary: Identixweb Ltd has initiated the research and development phase for a new product named "SiteGrowth AI," which is an AI-Powered Organic Growth Engine designed for SaaS and Business Websites. Currently, the initiative is in the research and feasibility stage, with the company evaluating various technical, commercial, and operational aspects of the platform. Identixweb Ltd will provide further updates to stakeholders once the product is launched. This information was submitted to BSE on March 25, 2026, and is also accessible on the company's investor relations website.

announcements.subject: Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd - 540788 - Intimation of Identified Date
announcements.detail: Aftertrade Broking Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has informed BSE regarding Intimation of Identified Date for the Proposed Open Offer of Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd ('Target Company') in Terms of SEBI (SAST) Reg., 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: The Acquirers, Mr. Arvind Karsandas Bhanushali, Mrs. Deepali Arvind Bhanushali, Mr. Jay Arvind Bhanushali, Mr. Nikunj Velji Mange, and Mr. Raj Arvind Bhanushali, along with Mrs. Shraddha Nikunj Mange, will make an open offer to acquire 26,76,180 equity shares of Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd at a price of ₹55 per share. This offer represents 26% of the company's fully paid-up equity share capital. Aftertrade Broking Pvt Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has informed BSE that the identified date for determining the shareholders to whom the Letter of Offer will be sent is fixed as 27/03/2026. This open offer is being made in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, following public announcements and the publication of a detailed public statement on 06/10/2025 and a Draft Letter of Offer on 13/10/2025.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer to the Public Shareholders of Manappuram Finance Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer to the public shareholders of Manappuram Finance Ltd. This document pertains to an Open Offer made by BC ASIA INVESTMENTS XXV LIMITED, along with BC ASIA INVESTMENTS XIV LIMITED and BC ASIA INVESTMENTS XXIV LIMITED, all incorporated in Mauritius. The Letter of Offer provides important details for public shareholders regarding the acquisition offer.

announcements.company: Pilani Investment and Industries Corporation Ltd
announcements.subject: Pilani Investment and Industries Corporation Ltd - 539883 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Intimation for allotment of Non-Convertible Debentures.
announcements.ai_summary: The Investment and Finance Committee of Pilani Investment and Industries Corporation Ltd., in its meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the allotment of 50,000 Fully Paid, Unsecured, Listed, Rated, Non-Cumulative, Redeemable, Rupee Denominated, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of ₹1,00,000, aggregating to ₹500 crores. These NCDs have been rated "AA+ (STABLE)" by CARE and CRISIL and were allotted on a private placement basis. This is disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Arman Financial Services Ltd - 531179 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Raising of Funds
announcements.detail: Allotment of 125 Cr NCD.
announcements.ai_summary: Arman Financial Services Ltd.'s Finance & Investment Committee, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, has allotted 1,25,000 senior, secured, listed, rated, taxable, transferable, redeemable, non-convertible debentures (NCDs). These NCDs have a face value of INR 10,000 each, aggregating to INR 125,00,00,000 (INR 125 crore). This allotment includes a Green Shoe Option of 25,000 NCDs and was made on a private placement basis. This follows up on a Board Meeting outcome from February 12, 2026.

announcements.subject: MM Forgings Ltd-$ - 522241 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today 25 March 2026 - Approved For The Fund Raising Through QIP Or Any Other Permissible Mode As May Be Considered Appropriate, And Increase In Authorized Share Capital, Subject To The Approval Of Shareholders
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting held today 25 March 2026 - Board approved for the fund raising through QIP or any other permissible mode as may be considered appropriate, and increase in Authorized Share Capital, subject to the approval of shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of MM Forgings Ltd. met on March 25, 2026, and approved a plan for fund raising. The company intends to raise funds not exceeding ₹600 crores through Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP) or any other permissible mode. Additionally, the Board approved an increase in the authorized share capital, subject to shareholder approval. This decision is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Arkade Developers Ltd - 544261 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on Business Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Arkade Developers Ltd has announced the launch of its new luxury residential project, Arkade Evoke, located in Goregaon West. This project has a Gross Development Value (GDV) of ₹230 crore and is targeted towards the luxury buyer segment. This launch marks Arkade Developers' eighth residential project in the Goregaon-Malad corridor, reinforcing its presence in this key Mumbai real estate market. The company has issued a press release on March 25, 2026, detailing this business update. Investors should note the GDV of ₹230 crore as a key financial indicator for this new development.

announcements.subject: Goldiam International Ltd - 526729 - Intimation Of Opening Of Twentieth (20Th) Retail Store For Lab-Grown Diamond Jewellery Under The Brand Name 'ORIGEM'.
announcements.detail: Intimation of opening of 20th retail store
announcements.ai_summary: Goldiam International Ltd has announced the opening of its twentieth (20th) retail store for lab-grown diamond jewellery under the brand name 'ORIGEM'. This new store is located at Nexus Mall Kukatpally. The company has been actively expanding its retail footprint, with previous store openings in various cities including Mumbai, Bengaluru, Noida, Chandigarh, Kolkata, Chennai, and Pune. This expansion under the 'ORIGEM' brand signifies the company's commitment to growing its presence in the lab-grown diamond jewellery market. The announcement was made on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: SJVN Ltd - 533206 - Tripartite Agreement Between The Company, Erstwhile RTA And New RTA
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: SJVN Limited has entered into a tripartite agreement on March 20, 2026, with Alankit Assignments Limited (erstwhile RTA) and MAS Services Limited (new RTA). This agreement is in compliance with Regulation 7 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This disclosure follows up on a previous announcement made on January 23, 2026. The company is informing the stock exchanges for their records.

announcements.subject: Stylam Industries Ltd - 526951 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: The Board of Directors at their meeting held on 25 March 2026, approved the alteration of Articles of Association by amending article 85.
announcements.ai_summary: Stylam Industries Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved amendments to Article 85 of the company's Articles of Association. This decision was made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has informed both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited about this development. Further details regarding the specific changes to Article 85 are expected to be made public following the board's approval.

announcements.subject: WeWork India Management Ltd - 544570 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release-Embassy Vertex
announcements.ai_summary: WeWork India Management Limited has announced a significant expansion in Bengaluru by signing a 10-year lease for an additional ~81,000 square feet of workspace at Embassy Vertex. This expansion represents an investment of ₹31 crore by WeWork India. The company, a leading premium flexible workspace operator, aims to enhance its presence in the Bengaluru market. This move is detailed in a media release dated March 25, 2026, and is also available on the company's investor relations website. The expansion is expected to cater to the growing demand for flexible office solutions in the city.

announcements.subject: Infosys Ltd - 500209 - Infosys Finacle To Power Digital Transformation For Producers Savings Bank Corporation In The Philippines
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Finacle, a subsidiary of Infosys, will power the digital transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines. This involves upgrading to the latest Finacle Core Banking Solution and implementing the Finacle Origination Solution. The upgrade aims to strengthen the bank's digital foundation, enhance operational resilience, and unlock new capabilities for personalized financial services. The Finacle Origination Solution will enable the bank to scale its lending business for SMEs and retail customers. This announcement was made on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust - 540565 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Indigrid Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust, through IndiGrid Investment Managers Limited, has completed the acquisition of securities in Gujarat BESS Private Limited for an enterprise value of approximately INR 573 Crore, subject to closing adjustments. The sellers are Securityholders British International Investment PLC (“BII”) and Norfund via KNI India AS (“Norfund”). This acquisition pertains to a project operating under a Build Own Operate (“BOO”) model, which is expected to generate an annual revenue exceeding INR 97 Crore. The disclosure was made on March 25, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The next steps involve finalizing closing adjustments as per the definitive agreements.

announcements.subject: MAS Financial Services Ltd - 540749 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of non-convertible debentures
announcements.ai_summary: MAS Financial Services Ltd has completed the allotment of 10,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with a face value of INR 1,00,000 each, aggregating to INR 100,00,00,000 (INR 100 Crore). These are rated, listed, senior, secured, redeemable, transferable, and taxable NCDs issued on a private placement basis. This decision was made by the Finance Committee of the Board of Directors on March 25, 2026, following a Board meeting on April 30, 2025. The company has complied with SEBI LODR Regulations and a master circular dated January 30, 2026. This issuance is a private placement, and no further approvals are immediately indicated as pending.

announcements.subject: Take Solutions Ltd - 532890 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - TAKE Solutions Launches Take.Health - An Intelligent Health Companion Targeting India''s $197 Billion Healthcare Opportunity.
announcements.ai_summary: Take Solutions Ltd has launched "Take.Health," an AI-driven digital health platform focused on preventive healthcare and personalized insights. This initiative targets India's substantial $197 billion healthcare market, aligning with the company's strategy to develop scalable capabilities in digital health and AI solutions. The launch, announced on March 25, 2026, aims to provide continuous health monitoring for users. The company has submitted this information to the BSE and NSE as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The next steps involve the market adoption and growth of the Take.Health platform.

announcements.subject: SGL Resources Ltd - 526544 - Intimation Of Payment Of Fine As Levied Under Regulation 33 For The Period Ended December 31, 2025
announcements.detail: Intimation of payment of fine as lecied under Regulation 33 for non compliance with filling unaudited financial statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025 within presecribed period under said regulation
announcements.ai_summary: SGL Resources Ltd has paid a fine of Rs. 88,500/- to BSE Limited on March 24, 2026. This fine was levied under Regulation 33 for non-compliance with filing unaudited financial statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, within the prescribed period. The company received an email on March 17, 2026, detailing the penalty. The fine includes GST. This action is in response to a SEBI SOP Circular no. SEBI/HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order from Hon''ble High Court of Telangana
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Ltd has received an order from the Hon'ble High Court of Telangana on March 24, 2026, dismissing a Writ Petition filed by Mr. Rishi Gupta, MD & CEO, challenging his arrest. This order follows earlier disclosures made by the bank on February 27, 2026. The bank acknowledges the court's decision and is considering appropriate legal recourse. The ongoing investigation pertains to program managers associated with multiple banks, including Fino Payments Bank. The bank will provide further updates as legal proceedings progress.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Intimation Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended
announcements.detail:
This is further to our earlier intimations, with respect to the proposed acquisition of controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd (Investor), which us owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC (Proposed Transaction).
We wish to inform that the Reserve Bank of India has vide its letter dated March 24, 2026, approved the applications made by the Company and Sammaan Finserve Limited (SFL)respectively, ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Ltd has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 24, 2026, for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd. Avenir Investment RSC Ltd is owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC. This approval follows previous intimations made by the company on October 2, 2025, October 29, 2025, November 7, 2025, and December 10, 2025. The RBI's clearance is a significant step towards the completion of this proposed transaction.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Issue of Securities pursuant to Rights Issue.
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd has approved the allotment of 29,38,500 fully paid-up equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 75 per share, including a share premium of Rs. 65 per share. This allotment is a result of their Rights Issue, which opened on March 13, 2026, and closed on March 23, 2026, achieving an oversubscription of 100.79% against a total Rights Issue Size of Rs. 22,03,87,500. The Rights Issue Committee met on March 24, 2026, to finalize the Basis of Allotment in consultation with the Registrar to the Issue and BSE Limited. This action will modify the company's paid-up equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Intimation Regarding Authorisation Given Under Reg 30(5) Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding authorisation fiven under Reg 30(5) of SEBI (LODR)Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Josts Engineering Company Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the divestment of a 50% equity stake in its joint venture, Suryavayu Renewable and Energy Solutions Private Limited (SRESPL), to Kay Cee Energy & Infra Limited (Kay Cee). The sale will be conducted at a fair market value of INR 4.124 per share, as determined by a Valuation Report. Post-transaction, SRESPL will cease to be a joint venture of Josts Engineering Company Ltd. The company also approved the incorporation of a new wholly-owned subsidiary in India to leverage future growth opportunities. These decisions are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sanathan Textiles Ltd - 544314 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Sanathan Polycot Private Limited is a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company who has entered into a Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement to acquire 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited, for sourcing renewable power for a contracted capacity of 32 MW.
announcements.ai_summary: Sanathan Textiles Ltd.'s wholly-owned subsidiary, Sanathan Polycot Private Limited (SPPL), has entered into agreements to acquire a 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited. This acquisition, for sourcing renewable power with a contracted capacity of 32 MW, is structured through a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement. The deal is subject to conditions precedent and regulatory approvals, with completion expected in line with agreed tranche timelines.

announcements.subject: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd - 500247 - Update On Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. has announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited (KMIL), will cease to sanction new loans from April 1, 2026. This decision, approved by KMIL's Board of Directors on March 24, 2026, aims to simplify the group structure and enhance operational synergies, in compliance with RBI Directions. KMIL will continue to service its existing facilities. The business activities of KMIL will be conducted departmentally within Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. going forward.

announcements.subject: CESC Ltd - 500084 - Incorporation Of Two Subsidiary Companies
announcements.detail: Incorporation of two subsidiary companies
announcements.ai_summary: CESC Ltd has announced the incorporation of two new wholly-owned subsidiary companies, PURVAH ECOENERGY SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED and PURVAH POWER VENTURES PRIVATE LIMITED, both incorporated on March 24, 2026. These subsidiaries were established by Purvah Green Power Private Limited, which is itself a subsidiary of CESC Ltd. This move is in line with CESC Ltd's strategy to expand its business operations. The incorporation details are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors should watch for future announcements regarding the specific business activities and financial contributions of these new entities.

announcements.subject: WeWork India Management Ltd - 544570 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 24, 2026 for Embassy Buildcon LLP
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Buildcon LLP, as a promoter of WeWork India Management Limited, has disclosed the reasons for encumbering its shares on March 12, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure is made under Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3). The encumbrance affects more than 20% of the total share capital of WeWork India Management Limited, although it is less than 50% of the promoter's shareholding. The specific reasons for this encumbrance have been submitted to the stock exchanges. Investors should review the disclosed reasons to understand the implications for the promoter's stake and potential future actions. The filing was received by the exchange on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Aptus Pharma Ltd - 544529 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 24, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Aptus Pharma Ltd, in their meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved a proposal to increase the company's authorized share capital from INR 7,15,00,000 to INR 25,00,00,000. This increase will be divided into 2,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The board also recommended the issue of bonus equity shares, subject to member approval.

announcements.subject: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd - 511644 - Clarification On Information Circulating On Social Media
announcements.detail: Clarification on false and misleading information circulating on social media platform such as telegram
announcements.ai_summary: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd has issued a clarification to address false and misleading information circulating on social media platforms, specifically Telegram. The company denies involvement in or association with claims such as launching "project OMEORA," opening 500 AI centers in Gujarat, Oracle holding a 75% stake, or a 5000% profit rise. Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd is filing a formal complaint against these claims and remains committed to accurate disclosures via the BSE portal.

announcements.subject: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd - 542057 - Listing Of Its Shares With The National Stock Exchange Of India (NSE)
announcements.detail: We would like to inform you that the Company is permitted to list its securities for trading on the NSE Platform with effect from 27th March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd has received permission to list its equity shares on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) with effect from March 27, 2026. The company's shares will trade under the symbol "BCPL" in the "EQ" series. A total of 16,723,638 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each are permitted for trading. This listing on the NSE will enhance the liquidity and accessibility of BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd's shares for investors.

announcements.subject: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd - 544516 - Media Interaction With NDTV Profit On 24.03.2026
announcements.detail: Media Interaction with NDTV Profit on 24.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd announced that its Joint Managing Director, Mr. Dakshna Moorthy Manikandan, participated in a media interaction with NDTV Profit on March 24, 2026. During the interaction, recent developments and the current status of the company were discussed, based solely on publicly available information. No unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) was disclosed. A recording of the interaction is available online.

announcements.subject: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 500420 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - NCLT Order
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR - NCLT Order
announcements.ai_summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, has uploaded an order regarding the first motion application for the proposed amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited. This order was uploaded on the NCLT website on March 23, 2026. This announcement is a continuation of the company's earlier intimation dated June 29, 2025, regarding the amalgamation scheme. The NCLT order is a significant regulatory step in the amalgamation process.

announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ltd - 532741 - Update On Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Ltd has announced that Maa Kudargarhi Steels Private Limited (“MKSPL”), a franchisee unit, has allotted 20,000 equity shares to Kamdhenu Ltd on March 24, 2026. These shares were issued at a price of Rs. 5,000 per equity share, with a face value of Rs. 10, for a total consideration of Rs. 10,00,00,000. This allotment represents the conversion of an existing unsecured loan of Rs. 10 crore provided by Kamdhenu Ltd to MKSPL into equity.

announcements.subject: Shalibhadra Finance Ltd - 511754 -  Disclosure In Terms Of Regulation 29(2) Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure in terms of Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Ayushi Doshi, identified as part of the promoter group of Shalibhadra Finance Ltd, has made a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This filing pertains to changes in her shareholding in Shalibhadra Finance Ltd, which is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange. The specific details of the acquisition or disposal, including the number of shares and percentage of total voting capital, are provided in the annexure to this disclosure.

announcements.subject: Ceigall India Ltd - 544223 - Cancellation Of Tenders Due To Administrative Reasons.
announcements.detail: In continuation of our earlier letter dated March 17, 2026, intimating regarding Ceigall Infra Projects Private Limited ('CIPPL'), a wholly owned subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited ('CIL'), emerging as L1 bidder (Aggregate bid cost of Rs. 207 Crores),  in the financial bid opening for two (2) tenders by Punjab Infrastructure Development Board, this is to inform that as per the information available on the Official e-Procurement portal of the Government ....
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall India Limited (CIL) has announced the cancellation of two tenders by the Punjab Infrastructure Development Board, for which its wholly owned subsidiary, Ceigall Infra Projects Private Limited (CIPPL), had emerged as the L1 bidder. The aggregate bid cost for these two tenders was Rs. 207 Crores. The cancellation, effective March 24, 2026, is due to administrative reasons, as communicated via email on the same date. The cancelled tenders were for the Construction and Development of World Class Urban Streets in Ludhiana on a Hybrid Annuity Model, specifically Package 1 (Tender ID: 2026_DOF_158211_2) and Package 3 (Tender ID: 2026_DOF_158228_2). This announcement follows an earlier intimation on March 17, 2026, regarding CIPPL's L1 status.

announcements.subject: Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd-$ - 532467 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update regarding conversion of its existing investment in optionally convertible debentures of its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s. Square Port Shipyard Private Limited into equity shares of the said wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Hazoor Multi Projects Ltd has approved an extension for its Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs) amounting to Rs. 25 Crores, held in its wholly owned subsidiary, Square Port Shipyard Private Limited. The tenure of these 0.01% OCDs has been extended by one year, from April 9, 2026, to April 9, 2027. Additionally, the company has approved a modification to the existing security arrangements, which include a property located at Navase, Taluka Dapoli, District Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. This follows previous intimations on January 27, 2026, and February 28, 2026, regarding the conversion of these OCDs into equity shares. The next steps involve the formal execution of the modified security and the continued monitoring of the subsidiary's performance.

announcements.subject: Nilkanth Engineering Ltd - 512004 - Compliance-57 (4) : Prior intimation to the beginning  of the quarter
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 57(4) of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that Since the Company has not issued any debt / interest carrying instruments, there will not by any payment towards interest in the ensuing Quarter April, 2026 to June, 2026.
